programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie fail to make a good impression on a professional couple who move in next door, while Arthur takes advantage of Spencers job. With Leah Remini and Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is stunned when God seemingly grants her prayers for a pay rise - so starts putting in more, far-from-spiritual requests with the Almighty. Doug tries to talk her out of it but, with an important football game on the horizon, he decides he could do with a bit of divine intervention himself

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray grows tired of Debras cooking and asks Marie to teach her how to make his favourite dish - spaghetti and meatballs - leading to chaos in the kitchen. Starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray runs into trouble while trying to show Debra he can take over the running of the family finances, and resorts to a series of elaborate lies to get himself out of the mess he has created. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes on patrol with his policeman brother Robert and ends up foiling a robbery at a local restaurant by pelting the would-be thief with pizza. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A workmate agrees to teach Frasier enough Hebrew to deliver the speech at his son Fredericks bar mitzvah, but the arrangement ends in double-dealing and mutual recrimination. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In the first of a three-part story, Frasier struggles to replace Daphne and ends up hiring a woman who proves to be completely unsuitable. Meanwhile, Niles experiences an amazing chain of events, including winning the same competition twice and having his car struck by lightning

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of three. While Niles waits to undergo his heart bypass operation, Frasier tries to keep everyones spirits up by describing the procedure in detail - a brainwave that leaves Daphne more depressed than ever. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Cedarwood Holidays in St Keverne, Cornwall, where married couple Kirstie and Joe hope their glamping experience will leave the BandBers green with envy. The guests are pleased with their pristine pods, and the chance to feed seals at a local wildlife sanctuary goes down a treat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are still in Cornwall for the weeks second visit, at The Llawnroc Hotel, where former Redcoats Craig and Rachel know what it takes to keep their guests entertained

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers spend a third consecutive visit in Cornwall, at ex-military man Jos The Olde Malthouse in Tintagel, where a number of BandBers are wowed by the heritage charm

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week takes the BandBers to Sherborne in Dorset, and The Britannia Inn, run by husband-and-wife team Lee and Hannah. Doubts about the decor get things off to a bad start for a handful of guests, while the controversial pricing at breakfast leaves Kirstie questioning whether shes getting enough bang for her buck

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Kirstie and Joe from Cedarwood Holidays want to know why not all of their guests would return to their place, before Craig and Rachel ask why not a single BandBer would choose to stay at theirs again. Jo from The Olde Malthouse is keen to mop up his cleanliness complaints, while Hannah and Lee from The Britannia Inn have a gripe with Jo in particular. They then learn the identity of the winner

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters at different stages of life. In 2019, Alistair and Candice were searching in Swindons pricey old town. Kirstie Allsopp realised that their budget and expectations didnt quite match, so it was going to be a tough search with some hard-hitting compromises. A year earlier, Thomas and Angelina had sold their family home of 32 years and were downsizing in Bolton, to be closer to their family. Phil Spencer returns to find out how both couples have got on since cameras stopped rolling

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil catches up with Carol and Andrew from Harrogate, who he first met in 2016 when they were at loggerheads over their beautiful three-bedroom home. Back then, Team Love It Andrews feet were set in concrete and he was adamant that they couldnt find a better location for them and their two children. Carol on the other hand was ready to list. As well as the dated, cramped kitchen, she could see a not-so-distant future where her dad Dennis may need to move into a house that was already bursting at the seams. With three generations to consider, Kirstie came up with an ingenious plan to create the family kitchen and extra bedroom space they needed, working to a budget of £60,000. Phil on the other hand had £475,000 to convince Andrew to up sticks. He showed them three beautiful homes in the Yorkshire countryside, one of which stole Carols heart, and Andrews resolve was seriously tested. But when the dust settled after an emotional decision chat with Kirstie and Phil, who was buying the drinks? Seven years on, Phil finds out if Carol and Andrew stuck to their decision and what they did next

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond presents the show giving people the chance to perform the one song that tells their story - often in front of a crowd for the very first time. Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Explorer Lucy Shepherd self-films as she undertakes a high-risk, on-foot expedition across remote regions of Tanzania alongside an Indigenous Hadza and Akie team. In this first episode, Lucy must adapt to life as a hunter-gatherer and earn the respect of the tribesmen, whose knowledge, skills and understanding of the land will be vital for the expedition

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: The worlds most remote and extraordinary hotels. This episode explores Bolivias Salar de Uyuni, a striking brutalist lodge seamlessly blending in with the edge of the worlds largest salt flat. It also features a futuristic getaway of bubble domes in County Fermanagh in Northern Ireland, a mirrored resort overlooking a majestic Norwegian fjord, an art deco hotel nestles amid the Pyrenees, and the extra-terrestrial-inspired design of a unique homestay in Wales

programme.title: Plane (2023)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Trailblazer Air pilot Captain Brodie Torrance takes flight with handcuffed prisoner Louis Gaspare on board. A direct lightning strike forces Torrance and co-pilot Dele to emergency land on a remote island under the control of militia leader Junmar. Action thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Mike Colter

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A 50-year-old hairstylist meets a well-travelled nutritionist, a conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher and an opera singer serenades his date. A high-energy spin instructor meets a passionate PE teacher. Will sparks fly, or does fate have other plans?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from in and around Edinburgh vie to host the best dinner party, beginning with competitive couple Michelle and Cameron, who deliver a Spanish-themed first meal. The second day throws up some tuba playing and extreme wine reactions at the home of bad joker Lindsay and his fiancee Tara. Last to host are Lehandra and Joe, who have only been dating for five months and have never thrown a dinner party before

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Events manager Mitch and kitchen designer Elliot recently bagged themselves a bargain home in Bromley, Kent, and wasted no time in gutting the interior. The only problem is, now they have no idea working out where everything should go and how to add style and proportion while sticking to their monochrome design throughout. Enter George Clarke to give them a few tips. The architect also pays a visit to a workshop where bespoke antique mirrors are made. But will he be able to achieve a distressed effect without getting too distressed himself?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The contestants get active as Armando Iannucci adopts a new persona to perform a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani grapples with bowling pins while wearing oven gloves and Joanna Page attempts a tricky skill she hasnt tried since she was about 12. Meanwhile, a topless Joel Dommett twirls a pretty umbrella and Amy Gledhill has to cope with someone shouting about scrambled eggs. Alex Horne keeps an eye on their progress, while Taskmaster Greg Davies hands out the points - and the put-downs when it all goes wrong

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Critically ill dialysis patient Gillian desperately needs fluids, so the East Anglian Air Ambulance crew must make a tough decision. In Canvey Island, the medics take over the breathing of motorcyclist Sol who is bleeding from his ear. In Luton, Essex and Herts Air Ambulance help 16-year-old Idris who has a head and leg injury after a collision with a car. In Norwich, Martin has fallen from a ladder and has a nasty open ankle fracture

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants that he set out to save, including the Mixing Bowl, the Olde Stone Mill, Peters and Campania. Have their owners pulled themselves out of their nightmares?

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond presents the show giving people the chance to perform the one song that tells their story - often in front of a crowd for the very first time. Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton meets Andi and Neil from York, who dream of retiring permanently to Spain with their son Joel and spaniel Dixie. Theyre looking for a three-bedroom house with a dog-friendly garden, where barbeque enthusiast Neil can cook up a storm close to the beach close to the coastal town of Mazarron, near Murcia. Laura has five sizzling options for their budget of £145,000, but will any of them turn out to be their new forever home?

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George Clarke helps unlock the potential of two houses in south London. He begins by helping NHS theatre nurse Hannah, whose Edwardian workers cottage in Thornton Heath is so small she has had to give the only decent bedroom to her two children while she sleeps in the front room. Can he provide the luxurious master bedroom she needs? George also helps a couple renovate their Streatham home, which would not be so bad if not for the previous owners love of glass chandeliers, Roman columns and marble-effect tiles

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam invents an elaborate lie to explain to his friends the humiliating injury he suffered in an encounter with a jealous husband. Bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part one of two. Coach falls for an unscrupulous woman who drops him when she wins the lottery, while Sam lusts after her daughter. Bette Ford and Ellen Regan guest star

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. Sam fails to make an impression on the object of his desire, and Coach faces a tough test when the woman he loves dumps him after a big-money win on the lottery

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: All Ray wants for Christmas is a little loving from his wife, but their hopes for an intimate Christmas are ruined by their familys constant interruptions

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Enlisting for an American Civil War re-enactment allows Ray to spend time with his father, until he realises they will be fighting on opposite sides. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally has to interview her oldest living relative as part of a school project on genealogy, so Ray helps her track down Franks long-lost Aunt Sarina, who lives in Italy but turns up on the Barones doorstep

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers confront an unscrupulous car-park attendant over a matter of principle - and two dollars. Meanwhile, Daphne leaves Frasiers home for the last time, and realises how much Eddie and Martin are going to miss her. Kelsey Grammer stars

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink hopes to become the new condominium president and tries to ensure he is elected by persuading an unsuspecting Martin to stand as a puppet candidate. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Rozs fun-loving 20-year-old cousin visits Seattle, and Frasier finds himself struggling to keep pace with her partying. Meanwhile, Martin has trouble coping without Daphne. Long-running American comedy, guest starring Zooey Deschanel (New Girl)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bulldog plays a practical joke on Frasier, who wastes no time in plotting revenge. Meanwhile, Niles and Daphne get caught up in a battle with a doorstep trick-or-treater. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordons disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Staffordshire to meet petrolhead Martin, whos also the organiser of a local music festival

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers are greeted by the Duchess of Northumberland on a visit to Alnwick Castle, where Matt is granted special access to the records tower, which holds precious documents detailing its role in major historical events. Janice follows in the footsteps of the castles archers of old, trying her hand with a bow and arrow in the grounds, and the family meet the Dukes official piper for the ultimate lesson on the ancient Northumbrian pipes

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Ranvir Singh in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps best friends of 50 years Jan and Chris find their dream holiday home in Almería, Spain, that works for both their families. In fact, between them they have six children and five grandchildren - so it could be a challenge to please everyone. With a joint budget of £150,000, Laura lines up five great options, but will Jan and Chris fall in love with one enough to end up making an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: In northern Italy, ambitious pair Kevin and Laura battle against the odds to finish their tricky renovations in time for the arrival of their first retreat guests. In Spain, cameras are back with BandB owners Kirsty and Simon as they try to extend their season. Meanwhile, new parents Vicky and Aurelian rise to the challenge as they open a bakery in France

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Loire Valley at Château La Grande Maison, Ben and Billies unfinished apartment gets their hearts racing as try to complete it for a decadent Valentines Day event. programme.desc: Substitute teacher Mrs Cantwell (Tina Fey) takes an instant dislike to Lisa, and vows to give the youngster extra credit if she can figure out why. Meanwhile, Flanders is plagued with guilt after punching Homer. Featuring the guest voice of author Richard Dawkins

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns attempts to fulfil his lifelong ambition of becoming a superhero and take down a rogues gallery of familiar faces, but devoted sidekick Smithers secretly intervenes after noticing his boss isnt quite up to the challenge. Lisa steps in as Barts attorney when he is falsely accused of pulling an Easter prank

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend - but when he starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously, Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, the Rev Lovejoy. Meanwhile, the dry cleaners mistakenly swap Marges wedding dress for one of Krustys clown costumes. With the guest voice of Edward Norton

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Cedarwood Holidays in St Keverne, Cornwall, where married couple Kirstie and Joe hope their glamping experience will leave the BandBers green with envy. The guests are pleased with their pristine pods, and the chance to feed seals at a local wildlife sanctuary goes down a treat

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are still in Cornwall for the weeks second visit, at The Llawnroc Hotel, where former Redcoats Craig and Rachel know what it takes to keep their guests entertained

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers spend a third consecutive visit in Cornwall, at ex-military man Jos The Olde Malthouse in Tintagel, where a number of BandBers are wowed by the heritage charm

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week takes the BandBers to Sherborne in Dorset, and The Britannia Inn, run by husband-and-wife team Lee and Hannah. Doubts about the decor get things off to a bad start for a handful of guests, while the controversial pricing at breakfast leaves Kirstie questioning whether shes getting enough bang for her buck

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Kirstie and Joe from Cedarwood Holidays want to know why not all of their guests would return to their place, before Craig and Rachel ask why not a single BandBer would choose to stay at theirs again. Jo from The Olde Malthouse is keen to mop up his cleanliness complaints, while Hannah and Lee from The Britannia Inn have a gripe with Jo in particular. They then learn the identity of the winner

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters at different stages of life. In 2019, Alistair and Candice were searching in Swindons pricey old town. Kirstie Allsopp realised that their budget and expectations didnt quite match, so it was going to be a tough search with some hard-hitting compromises. A year earlier, Thomas and Angelina had sold their family home of 32 years and were downsizing in Bolton, to be closer to their family. Phil Spencer returns to find out how both couples have got on since cameras stopped rolling

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Phil catches up with Carol and Andrew from Harrogate, who he first met in 2016 when they were at loggerheads over their beautiful three-bedroom home. Back then, Team Love It Andrews feet were set in concrete and he was adamant that they couldnt find a better location for them and their two children. Carol on the other hand was ready to list. As well as the dated, cramped kitchen, she could see a not-so-distant future where her dad Dennis may need to move into a house that was already bursting at the seams. With three generations to consider, Kirstie came up with an ingenious plan to create the family kitchen and extra bedroom space they needed, working to a budget of £60,000. Phil on the other hand had £475,000 to convince Andrew to up sticks. He showed them three beautiful homes in the Yorkshire countryside, one of which stole Carols heart, and Andrews resolve was seriously tested. But when the dust settled after an emotional decision chat with Kirstie and Phil, who was buying the drinks? Seven years on, Phil finds out if Carol and Andrew stuck to their decision and what they did next

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond presents the show giving people the chance to perform the one song that tells their story - often in front of a crowd for the very first time. Mentors Paloma Faith and Sam Ryder watch and listen to the performances. In the first episode, Alison heads to Liverpool, where a teenager sings Bocelli for the foster mum he cant find words to thank, and a kidney transplant recipient brings Sam and Paloma sprinting out into the downpour. With only one place available at the grand final at Londons Hackney Empire, Sam and Paloma face an impossible choice

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Explorer Lucy Shepherd self-films as she undertakes a high-risk, on-foot expedition across remote regions of Tanzania alongside an Indigenous Hadza and Akie team. In this first episode, Lucy must adapt to life as a hunter-gatherer and earn the respect of the tribesmen, whose knowledge, skills and understanding of the land will be vital for the expedition

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: The worlds most remote and extraordinary hotels. This episode explores Bolivias Salar de Uyuni, a striking brutalist lodge seamlessly blending in with the edge of the worlds largest salt flat. It also features a futuristic getaway of bubble domes in County Fermanagh in Northern Ireland, a mirrored resort overlooking a majestic Norwegian fjord, an art deco hotel nestles amid the Pyrenees, and the extra-terrestrial-inspired design of a unique homestay in Wales

programme.title: Plane (2023)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Trailblazer Air pilot Captain Brodie Torrance takes flight with handcuffed prisoner Louis Gaspare on board. A direct lightning strike forces Torrance and co-pilot Dele to emergency land on a remote island under the control of militia leader Junmar. Action thriller, starring Gerard Butler and Mike Colter

programme.title: Commando (1985)
programme.desc: The daughter of retired special forces officer John Matrix is kidnapped by an old comrade-in-arms, now in league with a deposed former dictator. The tyrant plans to use the girl to force Matrix into assassinating the head of the country he once ruled, but is unprepared for the lengths to which the veteran soldier will go to rescue his child. Action adventure, with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Rae Dawn Chong

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The no-nonsense chef sets out to help restaurants in need - by spying on them using a state-of-the-art surveillance system and with the help of a mole on the inside. For his first mission, he gains a 360-degree view of Parthenon, a family run Greek restaurant in Washington, DC. It was once a pillar of the community but its decor, utilities and hygiene are severely lacking. Gordon sets out to give owner Pete the tools he needs to improve the eatery so he can hand over the reins to his son

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon visits the Italian bistro Caffe Boa, where he exposes the toxic working relationship between husband-and-wife owners Patrick and Jenny. Can he change Patricks ways to save his business - and his marriage?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Contestants from in and around Edinburgh vie to host the best dinner party, beginning with competitive couple Michelle and Cameron, who deliver a Spanish-themed first meal. The second day throws up some tuba playing and extreme wine reactions at the home of bad joker Lindsay and his fiancee Tara. Last to host are Lehandra and Joe, who have only been dating for five months and have never thrown a dinner party before

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Events manager Mitch and kitchen designer Elliot recently bagged themselves a bargain home in Bromley, Kent, and wasted no time in gutting the interior. The only problem is, now they have no idea working out where everything should go and how to add style and proportion while sticking to their monochrome design throughout. Enter George Clarke to give them a few tips. The architect also pays a visit to a workshop where bespoke antique mirrors are made. But will he be able to achieve a distressed effect without getting too distressed himself?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sees The Bridges of Madison County and begins pining for a little romance to spice up her life, so the family reminisces about impassioned encounters in days gone by. Featuring the guest voices of Michelle Pfeiffer and Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: Robert and Amy split up and Ray is left to take the blame for making disparaging remarks about marriage. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.desc: Ray keeps visiting Roberts new apartment, which always seems to be swarming with pretty girls - until Debra puts in an appearance and curtails his enthusiasm. Ray Romano stars

programme.desc: The spirit of Christmas is in short supply when Ray gives his parents a personalised toaster and they sneak off to exchange it for a coffee machine. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.desc: Phoebe receives shocking news about her past, while Rachel is envious of Rosss uninhibited girlfriend. Monica mourns her previous relationships, prompting Chandler to offer his services as a boyfriend. Joey nags the pals to play a game involving removing items of clothing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel realises she wants to start dating Ross again and writes him an 18-page letter expressing her feelings - but he falls asleep while reading it. Phoebe and her estranged birth mother discover they have a lot in common, and Monica is stung by a jellyfish

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica goes on a date with her high-school heart-throb. Ross begins playing tricks on Rachel, and Phoebe convinces herself a stray cat is the reincarnation of her long-dead mother. Comedy, starring Lisa Kudrow, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler finds himself in hot water while dating Rachels pushy boss. Joey decides to buy an encyclopaedia, but discovers he can only afford one volume, and Monica resolves to prove her mother wrong. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry, Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: Chandler gets on more intimate terms with Joeys girlfriend, and Rosss love life improves - until his latest conquest reveals a grubby secret. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler in a Box
programme.desc: Chandler agrees to spend Thanksgiving in a packing crate as penance for kissing Kathy, and the friends decide to give each other seasonal gifts. Monica visits Richards son, who finds her every bit as attractive as his father did. Comedy, guest starring Michael Vartan

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Going to Party!
programme.desc: Things start looking up for the gang as Monica gets a career opportunity that is too good to turn down and Rachel is offered a promotion. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler are excited to hear an old friend is coming to visit. Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox star

programme.desc: Ross embarks on a long-distance relationship, Chandler sets Rachel up with one of his colleagues, and Phoebe composes a seasonal song for her friends. Monica has trouble asserting her authority at work and hires Joey so she can fire him in front of the staff

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes half-brother makes a startling announcement and asks a great favour of her, while Joey attempts to break down social barriers when he takes a job as a tour guide at Rosss museum. Chandler fears not living up to Kathys expectations

programme.desc: Rachel schemes to get a handsome client to ask her out on a date, while Chandlers girlfriend is driven away by his jealousy. Guest starring Tate Donovan

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: On the final leg of their journey, the pair continue through the snow to New Hampshire. Here, they meet rally-driving champion Tim ONeil who gives them a crash course in driving in the ice and snow before they take on an intense time trial. The pair travel on to Maine, where they take part in some wilderness training, before bidding farewell to the RV and heading out into the extremely choppy seas for some lobster fishing. Before heading home, the pair look back on some of their favourite moments from the trip

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. The pair begin their journey in Los Angeles, and head down to Muscle Beach to lift weights, before taking part in a game of volleyball. The following day, Bradley is terrified to hear that the agenda involves a 14,000ft skydive

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Actor Bradley Walsh and his 20-year-old son Barney hit the road together, travelling more than 2,000 miles from Los Angeles to New Orleans. In the second leg of their journey, the pair leave the city of Los Angeles behind and make their way down the famous Route 66 to the southwestern state of Arizona. Here, they ride through a deserted ghost town, before the father and son reach Lake Havasu City, where Barney has arranged for them to try jet-skiing. Finally, they attend a Cowboy College, where they learn to become real-life horsemen

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney arrive in Texas, where they enjoy driving around in tanks, experience space travel in a centrifuge and hear campfire tales about UFOs. First up, the pair undertake some centrifuge training, which is used to prepare astronauts for the crushing gravitational forces produced at take-off from the extreme exhilaration. They also head to the outskirts of Houston to meet some UFO enthusiasts who investigate claimed sightings of extra-terrestrials, and are gripped by stories of spaceships blocking roads and people being taken by aliens for experiments

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son Barney embark on the final leg of their journey, which sees the pair arrive in the Louisiana city of New Orleans. Here, they visit a spiritual voodoo priest for a spot of energy cleansing, and feed alligators in the Bayou with Captain Billy, who knows every corner of the wetlands, having been born and raised on the bayous of South Louisiana. Later, Bradley hops on board the Natchez jazz Steamboat, before the pair take to the streets to lead a spectacular parade with a six-piece band

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor Bradley Walsh and his son Barney return for a second series as they embark on another road trip across America together, beginning their journey in Florida, the southernmost point of the country. programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

Plus, nanny and pony groom Fabia is matched with country boy George, who supposedly sports a bit of an edge. Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklaters film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Barts life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

Second up is a shy rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during a week in March 2021, including Line of Duty, Ant and Decs Saturday Night Takeaway, This Is My House, The Proof Is Out There, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, Countdown, This Morning, and vaccines on the News

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Four more celebrities go in search of romance with members of the public. Brad Simpson, lead singer of boy band the Vamps, meets an 18-year-old fan, while Atomic Kittens Natasha Hamilton goes on her first date since splitting up with fellow pop star Ritchie Neville, the father of her fourth child. Bernie Clifton, mainstay of 1970s and 1980s TV with his ostrich puppet, has an encounter with an 80-something bellydancer, while rugby league player Keegan Hirst gets an introduction to the gay dating scene from a fitness adviser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfields first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica goes on a date with a guy from the coffee shop, while Geoffrey ends up on an episode of The Dating Game. Beverly learns that Murray has spontaneously purchased a shore house

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Following Erica and Geoffs break-up, Murray decides to take Erica out on a daddy-daughter date to cheer her up, and Adam is excited to participate in the school senior prank

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The teams are paired up into four groups of four to design and build the exterior of a go kart, before taking their pimped-up creations to the track for an adrenaline-fuelled race to the finish line. Hamish Blake hosts, while Ryan Brickman McNaught mentors and guides the contestants. Singer, actor and model Sophie Monk appears as a special guest judge

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: After a virtual pit stop in Langkawi in Malaysia, the race continues as the celeb teams push on without a break. Crabbiness creeps in as the teams must catch and sell crabs. Its a hot, stressful and exhausting day, and when our celebs find out theyll be spending a night camping on the sand. The next morning, the teams fly south to the island of Penang

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Hoping for a romantic getaway, Philip brings new girl Georgia along on a rural retreat with the gang. But when details of his past begin to surface, cracks start to show. When Zeyno and Arman call it quits due to his flirtatious friendship with Elys, Zeyno reveals a secret shes been sitting on for a while. Also, Jazz is determined to move on from Inga

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The fourth Commitment Ceremony has arrived, and the couples must face their toughest relationship challenges yet. One groom is keen to address his wifes accusations that hes an egomaniac, while another couple try to move past some troubling insecurities

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Theres a mood of celebration at the Couples Retreat, until one bride makes a snarky joke about another couples intimacy milestone

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Soul (2020)
programme.desc: Joe Gardner is a middle school music teacher in New York City, who fervently believes that music is life. He auditions to play piano at a popular jazz club as part of a quartet led by Dorothea Williams. On his way home from impressing Dorothea, Joe tumbles down an open manhole and lingers in limbo between life and death. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jamie Foxx and Tina Fey

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer tries to help his fugitive mother Mona evade justice, but unwittingly delivers her into the hands of the police - who promptly put her on trial for sabotaging Mr Burns germ warfare laboratory back in the 1960s. With the guest voice of Glenn Close

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is elected student president and immediately falls foul of Principal Skinner, who fools her into taking popular classes off the curriculum. Angry at his deception, she retaliates by calling her classmates out on strike. With the guest voice of film-maker Michael Moore

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tony Blair, JK Rowling and Ian McKellen are present to witness the Simpson familys arrival on holiday in London, where Homer crashes a rented car into the Queens horse-drawn carriage and gets locked up in the Tower

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is filmed fleeing from a wild bear and becomes a local laughing stock. Determined to redeem himself and salvage his reputation, he builds a special protective suit and sets about organising a rematch - to be fought on his terms

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is awarded his own talk show and takes over Krustys regular TV slot - but makes the mistake of tackling subjects suggested by Lisa. Inevitably, the ratings soon start tumbling and the spectre of cancellation looms. With the guest voices of Jackie Mason and A-Team star Mr T

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love of learning

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Rylan and his mother Linda, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Micah Richards and Jamie Carragher, Martin and Roman Kemp, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe and Mel C and her brother Paul, turn their hand to being the countrys most opinionated viewers, sharing their opinions on Stranger Things, This Is MY House, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, For Soccer Aid, The Savoy, Million Pound Pawn, Romeo and Duet, and BBC News reporting on the demise of Neighbours. From June 2022

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Wild Isles, Rise and Fall, Challenge Anneka, Race Across the World, The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer, This Morning and BBC News bulletins. From March 2023

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: TV weather presenter Sian Lloyd is wary of media attention after the collapse of her marriage, but gourmet cheese merchant Max is intent on melting her heart. Daniel Brocklebank - aka Coronation Street vicar Billy - fears kiss-and-tells, so wants to meet someone who doesnt know who he is. American Dustin may be just the man - if he can get over how similar they are. This instalment also sees Made in Chelsea star Jess Woodley meet up with wide-boy entrepreneur Luke, and Educating Yorkshire participant Musharaf Asghar embark on his first ever date

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Podiatrist Felicity meets handsome city boy Jethro, who describes himself as Marmite, while 24-year-old Irishman Damian believes his Tourettes is the reason he has yet to find the man of his dreams. He goes on a date with part-time model Kai, who is a sucker for an Irish accent. Meanwhile, 79-year-old history student Joe has a poignant and cheeky date with Dee, boat builder Abbey swaps her overalls for a dress in a bid to win the heart of special effects technicians James, and accountant Ajai meets his date Hema

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on shows including Starstruck, The Piano, You, Rick Steins Cornwall, Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over USA, 24 Hours in AandE, a This Morning feature about the worlds longest tongue and ITV News reporting on cheese. From February 2023

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Scott, CEO of clothing retailer New York and Company, disguises himself to go undercover among his own employees seeking ways to keep the business in vogue and increase profitability. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Renee Maloney, the co-founder of art class studios Painting with a Twist, goes undercover in her own organisation to make sure that her growth projections for the company are possible. She works in disguise with her own staff including an art instructor, a trainee manager and a franchise owner

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups? Danielle and Steve bought what they thought was the perfect suburban home. But they were wrong. As their circumstances shifted, so did their love of the house. The twins must now tackle terrible tiles and a costly fix in the kitchen. And when the couple go house hunting, theres a home so good, theres instant tears. But can they afford it? Short:The twins tackle terrible tiles in Danielle and Steves suburban home. And when the couple go house hunting, one home causes instant tears. But are they happy ones or not?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Warwickshire, Katie and Clive kick off with an attempt to recreate a fine-dining menu, but it proves tough to please discerning diner Bianca. Day two sees joker Levi and wife Hannah cook up a Scottish menu with an Asian twist, but the food gets a mixed reception. Finally its Biancas turn to cook for her guests and expectations are high for the foodie of the week to cook up a great meal with the help of husband Dave. But who will secure the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Reading compete to host the best dinner party. Upstanding couple Liz and David kick off the competition with a menu replicating the first food they ever cooked together. However, prank-loving guests Jo and Steve take centre stage as talk around the table turns a bit alternative. On fashion models Franky and Charlis night, Liz proves to be the wildcard as she reveals how much shes researched their online portfolios. On the final night, Jo cannot stomach whats on her and Steves own menu. However, it remains to be seen who will walk away with the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Jack has three weeks and £12,000 to organise the biggest magic show ever for his wedding day to Sarah. However, his fiancee wants nothing more than one day in her life when Jack and his magic take a back seat so that she can be the centre of attention

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid back groom Josh has just three weeks and £12,000 to pull off the perfect wedding for his bride-to-be Amy. She dreams of a peaceful day close to home with all her friends and family around her, but Josh has big plans for an ambitious beach wedding abroad

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Platinum-selling, Grammy-nominated singer-songwriter, actor and author Jewel goes undercover to meet talented musicians and artists struggling to break through. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to New Jerseys Spanish Pavillion, which is run by two warring brothers whose staff spend more time using their mobile phones than working. The chef plans to turn the eaterys fortunes around, and starts by giving the dining room and menu a modern makeover

Finally, its the turn of drama teacher Helen, and saleswoman by day, singer by night, Victoria, to show the competition how its really done

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottinghamshire, Nena and her husband Vish kick off the competition with an Indian feast. Day two sees Syreeta and laid-back Romaine host an evening. The post-meal planking contest proves a hit, but Romaines romantic crooning hits a bum note. Finally its the turn of Vicki and her husband Paul to try to see off the competition and bag themselves the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Dele is given £12,000 and three weeks to plan the perfect wedding for his fiancee Tracy. After a 15-year engagement, Tracy is seeking nothing less than her dream of a romantic castle as the venue for her big day, but Dele seems more concerned about arranging a ceremony with a dramatic twist - inspired by his favourite soap opera

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Comic book-loving groom Anthony wants to prove he can be a real superhero to bride-to-be Lauren, by organising a comic-inspired wedding in a cave. However, with Lauren hoping for a traditional affair, Anthony has his work cut out to convince her family that his theme will prove successful

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Raphael is given £12,000 to plan his wedding to his fiancee Ola, and decides to arrange not one but two ceremonies - a church blessing followed by a large-scale traditional Nigerian celebration. Bride-to-be Ola has been dreaming of a small, intimate occasion, so Raphaels double-feature idea might come as a shock, but if the big day is to get off the ground, the laid-back groom must overcome his habit of leaving everything to the last minute - including the booking of a suitable church

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Romantically hopeless groom-to-be Dan has three weeks and £12,000 to plan the perfect wedding for his future wife Kate. He wants to prove he can be romantic by pulling off a dramatic wedding hundreds of miles away in Italy. However, his vision is worlds away from Kates dream of a traditional fairy tale wedding surrounded by family and friends

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be and survival enthusiast Tom plans an outdoor wedding on a remote Scottish island, and wants to put his survival skills to the test with a woodland ceremony and a rugged reception. However, his future bride Sue dreams of a traditional wedding day in a stately home

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA

The eaterys co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Returning to the restaurant from earlier in the series is 31-year-old Luca from Essex. After his last date with TV presenter Hayley didnt work out, the self-proclaimed Italian Stallion is paired with 32-year-old Natalie, a saleswoman and amateur Tina Turner impersonator. Plus, nanny and pony groom Fabia is matched with country boy George, who supposedly sports a bit of an edge. Also seeking companionship are English teacher and facial piercing addict George, bibliophile Ria, handyman David and care worker Denise

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesnt react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later hes still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer acquires a pet monkey to help him with his chores, while Bart begins co-hosting a childrens news programme with Lisa - and decides to take a leaf out of Kent Brockmans book, cynically concentrating on human interest stories in a bid to boost his own popularity

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a parody of Richard Linklaters film Boyhood, this episode is a coming-of-age story chronicling Barts life from the age of six to him becoming a fully accomplished young man. His tense relationship with Homer is catalogued, as is the fact that he is overshadowed by the more successful Lisa at every turn. These factors shape his personality and his future more than he realises

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil spends quality time with Haley and takes her on a tour of his old college. Meanwhile, Gloria and Jay are forced to talk about an intimate subject with Manny. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The gang is quick to help a neighbour whose house has burnt down, but nothing quite works out the way it was intended. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Im Just a Girl Who Cant Say Doh
programme.desc: Marge puts on a play written by Lisa when she gets a big job at the theatre, while Homer develops a crush on Maggies baby class supervisor

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes on holiday to Niagara Falls, where a mix-up sees Lisa mistakenly granted asylum in Canada and Marge has to come to her daughters rescue

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns cuts health care benefits for his employees, so Marge buys healing crystals to treat Barts ADD and decides to sell them to support her family when they appear to work

programme.title: Americas Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining contestants head to Santa Monica pier, where they are required to model clothes designed by the Kardashians on a moving carousel in high heels. Guest judge La Toya Jackson helps the girls with the photoshoot theme, while behind the scenes, Shannon devises a way the house phone can be shared equally, but ends up in tears when her idea is challenged by Bianca.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie cant drop off to sleep, Homer tells her a bedtime story about a holiday to the Grand Canyon taken by the Simpsons and the Flanders. At first the two families are at odds, but when they get stranded, Homer and Ned must go for help and the clans begin to bond

programme.title: Men in Black: International (2019)
programme.desc: The intergalactic law enforcers have always protected the Earth from the scum of the universe. This time they tackle their biggest threat - a mole in the Men in Black organisation. Director F Gary Grays fantasy sequel, starring Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Rebecca Ferguson

programme.title: Die Hard (1988)
programme.desc: New York cop John McClane visits Los Angeles to see his family over the Christmas holiday. Stopping off at his wifes place of work, he realises armed men have taken over the building and are holding the corporations staff to ransom - and only he has the ability to fight back. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis, Alan Rickman and Bonnie Bedelia

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. Six-foot pansexual opera singer Clare is looking for a man as tall as she is, while Jessica, who has a disastrous dating history, hopes to bring out her naughty side

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: TV weather presenter Sian Lloyd is wary of media attention after the collapse of her marriage, but gourmet cheese merchant Max is intent on melting her heart. Daniel Brocklebank - aka Coronation Street vicar Billy - fears kiss-and-tells, so wants to meet someone who doesnt know who he is. American Dustin may be just the man - if he can get over how similar they are. This instalment also sees Made in Chelsea star Jess Woodley meet up with wide-boy entrepreneur Luke, and Educating Yorkshire participant Musharaf Asghar embark on his first ever date

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during a week in March 2021, including Line of Duty, Ant and Decs Saturday Night Takeaway, This Is My House, The Proof Is Out There, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, Countdown, This Morning, and vaccines on the News

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Four more celebrities go in search of romance with members of the public. Brad Simpson, lead singer of boy band the Vamps, meets an 18-year-old fan, while Atomic Kittens Natasha Hamilton goes on her first date since splitting up with fellow pop star Ritchie Neville, the father of her fourth child. Bernie Clifton, mainstay of 1970s and 1980s TV with his ostrich puppet, has an encounter with an 80-something bellydancer, while rugby league player Keegan Hirst gets an introduction to the gay dating scene from a fitness adviser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa bids to save the reputation of Springfields first female inventor, while Marge and Homer begin to suspect that Bart might be a sociopath

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica goes on a date with a guy from the coffee shop, while Geoffrey ends up on an episode of The Dating Game. Beverly learns that Murray has spontaneously purchased a shore house

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Following Erica and Geoffs break-up, Murray decides to take Erica out on a daddy-daughter date to cheer her up, and Adam is excited to participate in the school senior prank

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: The teams are paired up into four groups of four to design and build the exterior of a go kart, before taking their pimped-up creations to the track for an adrenaline-fuelled race to the finish line. Hamish Blake hosts, while Ryan Brickman McNaught mentors and guides the contestants. Singer, actor and model Sophie Monk appears as a special guest judge

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: After a virtual pit stop in Langkawi in Malaysia, the race continues as the celeb teams push on without a break. Crabbiness creeps in as the teams must catch and sell crabs. Its a hot, stressful and exhausting day, and when our celebs find out theyll be spending a night camping on the sand. The next morning, the teams fly south to the island of Penang

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Hoping for a romantic getaway, Philip brings new girl Georgia along on a rural retreat with the gang. But when details of his past begin to surface, cracks start to show. When Zeyno and Arman call it quits due to his flirtatious friendship with Elys, Zeyno reveals a secret shes been sitting on for a while. Also, Jazz is determined to move on from Inga

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partners parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The fourth Commitment Ceremony has arrived, and the couples must face their toughest relationship challenges yet. One groom is keen to address his wifes accusations that hes an egomaniac, while another couple try to move past some troubling insecurities

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Theres a mood of celebration at the Couples Retreat, until one bride makes a snarky joke about another couples intimacy milestone

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little take part in the culinary challenge, with guest judge Cherish Finden joining regulars Paul Hollywood, Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond. The contestants make Signature pull-apart savoury rolls and grapple with vegan fruit tarts in the Technical. And for the Showstopper, the celebs recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever

programme.title: Soul (2020)
programme.desc: Joe Gardner is a middle school music teacher in New York City, who fervently believes that music is life. He auditions to play piano at a popular jazz club as part of a quartet led by Dorothea Williams. On his way home from impressing Dorothea, Joe tumbles down an open manhole and lingers in limbo between life and death. Animated fantasy, with the voices of Jamie Foxx and Tina Fey

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer tries to help his fugitive mother Mona evade justice, but unwittingly delivers her into the hands of the police - who promptly put her on trial for sabotaging Mr Burns germ warfare laboratory back in the 1960s. With the guest voice of Glenn Close

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is elected student president and immediately falls foul of Principal Skinner, who fools her into taking popular classes off the curriculum. Angry at his deception, she retaliates by calling her classmates out on strike. With the guest voice of film-maker Michael Moore

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tony Blair, JK Rowling and Ian McKellen are present to witness the Simpson familys arrival on holiday in London, where Homer crashes a rented car into the Queens horse-drawn carriage and gets locked up in the Tower

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is filmed fleeing from a wild bear and becomes a local laughing stock. Determined to redeem himself and salvage his reputation, he builds a special protective suit and sets about organising a rematch - to be fought on his terms

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is awarded his own talk show and takes over Krustys regular TV slot - but makes the mistake of tackling subjects suggested by Lisa. Inevitably, the ratings soon start tumbling and the spectre of cancellation looms. With the guest voices of Jackie Mason and A-Team star Mr T

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus discovers that his wife Brandine has been hiding a secret love of learning

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Rylan and his mother Linda, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Micah Richards and Jamie Carragher, Martin and Roman Kemp, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe and Mel C and her brother Paul, turn their hand to being the countrys most opinionated viewers, sharing their opinions on Stranger Things, This Is MY House, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, For Soccer Aid, The Savoy, Million Pound Pawn, Romeo and Duet, and BBC News reporting on the demise of Neighbours. From June 2022

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on shows including Starstruck, The Piano, You, Rick Steins Cornwall, Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over USA, 24 Hours in AandE, a This Morning feature about the worlds longest tongue and ITV News reporting on cheese. From February 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics give their opinions on Coronation Street, Love Island, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Starstruck, Cheat, Dancing on Ice, and Catfish UK. From March 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Great Expectations, Rise and Fall, Wild Isles, Dance 100, Tempting Fortune, Married at First Sight Australia and Project Icon: The UKs Next Music Star. They also watch the news coverage of an asteroid passing between the Earth and the moon. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Podiatrist Felicity meets handsome city boy Jethro, who describes himself as Marmite, while 24-year-old Irishman Damian believes his Tourettes is the reason he has yet to find the man of his dreams. He goes on a date with part-time model Kai, who is a sucker for an Irish accent. Meanwhile, 79-year-old history student Joe has a poignant and cheeky date with Dee, boat builder Abbey swaps her overalls for a dress in a bid to win the heart of special effects technicians James, and accountant Ajai meets his date Hema

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their thoughts on shows including Starstruck, The Piano, You, Rick Steins Cornwall, Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over USA, 24 Hours in AandE, a This Morning feature about the worlds longest tongue and ITV News reporting on cheese. From February 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics give their opinions on Coronation Street, Love Island, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Starstruck, Cheat, Dancing on Ice, and Catfish UK. From March 2023

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Craig decides to plan an Oktoberfest-themed wedding, but his uncompromising fiancee Sofia dreams of a boho beach wedding day

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: A professional dancer from London seeks a man who can pop some moves on the dance floor and also help him lose his virginity. Second up is a shy rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost. Presented by Anna Richardson

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a deeply divisive week away, everyones grinding their axes ahead of the fifth dinner party, where friendships are fractured and the groups dynamic is irreversibly altered

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments and best TV shows from series 21. The armchair critics watch and share their opinions on Starstruck, Married at First Sight Australia, Challenge Anneka, The Piano and Fall

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria insists on a night of salsa dancing with Jay, and Mitchell challenges Cameron to try to get an attractive womans number. Meanwhile, Phil builds a treehouse

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam and Mitch go on diets, and Phil is inspired to try his hand at tightrope walking. Meanwhile, Claire tries to plant ideas in the heads of her warring daughters, and Jays behaviour grates on Gloria

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Geoff compete against Barry and Joanne to see who is the best couple. Meanwhile, Adam gets a job to prove his independence to Brea

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly involves herself in Erica and Barrys relationships, and Adam and Brea are cast opposite of each other in the school play, but rivalry sours things

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Competitive adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high on his big day and has an adventurous plan to take his wedding to the sky. However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: First of the two-part finale of the comedy, with Phil and Claire deciding that one of the kids needs to move out so they can take control of the house again. Meanwhile, as Gloria becomes more successful at work, she notices Jay, Manny and Joe dont seem to need her as much

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the comedy, all the members of the Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan discover that saying goodbye is a lot harder than it seems

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica goes on a date with a guy from the coffee shop, while Geoffrey ends up on an episode of The Dating Game. Beverly learns that Murray has spontaneously purchased a shore house

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Following Erica and Geoffs break-up, Murray decides to take Erica out on a daddy-daughter date to cheer her up, and Adam is excited to participate in the school senior prank

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron seek legal guardians for Lily and begin secretly assessing their family members. The duos decision is made difficult, however, when they catch Jay dishing out tough love to Manny, and find out that Clare has been taking Luke to a child psychologist due to his lack of development

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Gloria hope to spend time with their children outdoors, but their plan backfires. Meanwhile, Phil witnesses an unexpected moment of weakness from Jay. American comedy, starring Julie Bowen, Sofia Vergara and Ty Burrell

programme.desc: Chef Yotam Ottolenghis culinary journey takes him to Istanbul, where he tastes fish from the waters of the Bosphorus, shops for vegetables and samples the street food. programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals on a budget, offering tips on keeping costs down and wasting less food. Beginning with recipes that work out at less than £1.80 a portion, he cooks up a roast brisket of beef with all the trimmings, Korean stir-fried rice, and sweet pea fish pie, before showing a takeaway lover how to make his favourite treat for a fraction of the price of ordering it in

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals for an average of £1.30 a portion. He cooks a roast half shoulder of pork with all the trimmings before turning the leftovers into dim sum buns, and rustles up meatloaf with spaghetti and a tomato and chilli sauce. The chef also shows a takeaway lover how to make a vegetable korma with cauliflower pilau for a fraction of the price of ordering it in, and helps a woman put all the meat in her freezer to good use instead of wasting it

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson in Northumberland, where the pair learn how mead is made on Holy Island. James cooks up a Singapore-inspired crab and lobster dish on a stunning beach, before he and Kenny enjoy a cruise around Coquet Island, which is an RSPB reserve

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen on a visit to the Isle of Man during the warm-up week for the famous TT race. James serves up proper biker food - pork burgers with a spicy apple sauce - and picks up some local Manx kippers to make soup. Lisa visits local organic juice producers before James joins TT legend John McGuinness as he and his team prepare for the race, treating the bikers to lamb chops with hispi cabbage and an olive glaze

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit a vegetarian Indian restaurant on the outskirts of Bradford. Its run by a husband-and-wife team aiming for a Michelin star

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King visit the Stackpole Inn in Pembrokeshire, a multi award-winning gastro pub. Owners Gary and Becky first took it on 15 years ago, and were joined in 2019 by head chef Matt Waldron. Its the Bikers mission to introduce Matt and team Stackpole to the fantastic local food producers that arent yet on their radar

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go Local
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King are in Northumberland, enjoying its stunning coastline and rugged landscapes. The duo visit Hjem, a Michelin-starred restaurant located within the Hadrian Hotel and run by Scandinavian-born chef Alex and his partner Ally, whos front of house. Its the Bikers job to help Alex and Ally connect with new, local producers, ones that can inspire award-winning cuisine
