programme.desc: From the outside, 34-year-old Linda Singletons life appeared picture perfect. However, no one knew that she was engaged in a deadly love triangle. When the affair came to light, her perfect life came to an untimely end

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: The murder of 47-year-old church-going mother Marilyn Reza, who was shot dead in her home in December 1990. Officers initially suspected fellow parishioners, though a secret confession at her funeral directed them towards her widower Robert

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: The case of 24-year-old Megan Sharpton, who was raped and murdered before her body was set alight in July 2012. The torment led to her mother committing suicide

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: The murders of retired Michigan police officer Michael Greene and his wife Terri in their home. Police found evidence of a personal grudge as a possible motive for the crime

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers
programme.desc: The crimes of Donna Yaklich, who gunned down her husband - a Pueblo police officer - in the driveway of his home in December 1985

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers
programme.desc: The case of Colleen Harris, who was convicted of first-degree murder after gunning down her third husband Bob, a former US Forest Service supervisor, in January 2013, because she was worried about losing him

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: How, when 93-year-old Penny Knell was admitted to a special care facility, a devious mastermind was waiting to prey upon societys most vulnerable

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: How, in Michigan, a simple affair between two colleagues became more complex as the lovers proved willing to do anything - even commit murder - to protect their secret

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: When doting mother Cheryl Coker vanished from Riverside, Ohio, in October 2018 search efforts came up empty. However, police uncovered disturbing information and a web of secrets

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: How, following a senseless murder that rocked an African-American neighbourhood in 1970s Detroit, police arrested suspects who were ultimately convicted of the crime. However, 47 years later, the truth finally emerged to right historys wrongs

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: A respected police officer shot on his way home from work. Plus, a young man found dead in his bed. In both cases, police had to determine what had happened to these men

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: A case in which 20-year-old disappeared when travelling from her fiances home. Investigators suspected that someone from law enforcement might be responsible

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.sub-title: My Father, The Serial Killer: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: The case of Edward Wayne Edwards, who murdered at least five people, and was brought to justice 40 years after the killings thanks to the intervention of his daughter April Balascio

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: Police officer Andy Kimbrel hopes to find happiness with new wife Stephanie Keller. When the marriage starts to fail, Andy falls victim to manipulation and violence

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A case in which a married couple were found shot dead in their home. Investigators revealed a bizarre story that involved drugs, stolen money and a pet parrot who became a witness

programme.title: Twisted Love
programme.sub-title: The Hand That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: A love triangle that led to one very murderous twist after a married father of two engaged in an affair with his wifes first cousin

programme.title: The Golden State Killer: Its Not Over
programme.sub-title: The Horror of What Happened There
programme.desc: Investigator Paul Holes continues to examine the Golden State Killers murderous attacks in Santa Barbara. Meanwhile, armed with new theories, the citizen sleuths find a lead good enough to submit to the FBI

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.sub-title: Id Kill for a Sex Change
programme.desc: A former child star and his wife blaze a path of destruction to feed their greed and lust. Plus, a lawyer chases a life of hedonism in Hollywood - until it drives him over a cliff

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: Examining the disappearance of Adea Shabani, who crossed oceans to pursue her Hollywood dreams

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: In November 2008, James Browns son-in-law, Darren Lumar, was shot dead. When detectives dig into Lumars past, the possibility for motives becomes endless

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Chris and Theresa seemed like a perfectly matched couple. But when one of them vanished, it led to five months of hell and a shocking final act

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The death of police officer Robert McElrath, whose body was found near a railroad trestle in California in early January 2011. His wife Joanna was later convicted of the killing

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise is caught in the deadly grip of an alien spaceship whose commander, the enigmatic and ruthless Balok, gives the crew just 10 minutes to live. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve uses his strength to repair a damaged aircraft in order to escape an African nation with filmed proof of UN treaty violations

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An ex-colleague of Hooker becomes obsessed with avenging his daughters rape. Police drama, starring William Shatner, with a guest appearance by fellow Star Trek veteran Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An accountant speaks out against his former boss who is a notorious crook, causing the new Rangers Gage and Sydney to shield the man and his family from the criminals wrath

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: An expedition to find King Solomons diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace. The tycoon behind the mission sends his assistant, a former CIA agent, to find out what became of the explorers - only to discover that the party met a grisly fate at the hands of a horde of vicious apes. Action adventure based on Michael Crichtons novel, with Dylan Walsh, Laura Linney, Tim Curry and Grant Heslov

programme.title: Conan the Barbarian (2011)
programme.desc: An evil warlord kills a barbarian chieftain, whose son grows up to be a mighty warrior and seeks revenge for his fathers death. He finds there is more at stake, as the tyrant is close to acquiring all the pieces of a magic mask, which will make him all-powerful. Fantasy adventure, with Jason Momoa, Stephen Lang, Ron Perlman and Rose McGowan

programme.title: Revenge (2017)
programme.desc: A hunting trip turns into a nightmare for a couple when two sleazy friends arrive unannounced, setting off a gruesome chain of events. Thriller, starring Matilda Lutz, Kevin Janssens and Vincent Colombe

programme.title: A Certain Justice (2014)
programme.desc: A military veteran suffering from post-traumatic stress comes to the aid of a prostitute who is being attacked by members of a white supremacist group. He kills some of the men in the ensuing confrontation, and the leader of the racist gang vows revenge on the soldiers family. Action adventure, starring Cung Le, Dolph Lundgren and Vinnie Jones.

programme.desc: British officers detained in an Italian PoW camp intend to escape, but an informer threatens to scupper their audacious plan. Second World War drama, starring Richard Todd, Bernard Lee, Michael Wilding, Richard Attenborough and Donald Houston

programme.title: The Spy Who Came in from the Cold (1965)
programme.desc: A burnt-out British spy is ordered to venture undercover in East Germany. He begins by faking his resignation and subsequent alcoholic depression to dupe the enemy into trusting him, but, as he becomes further embroiled in his mission, he comes to realise that he is merely a pawn. Espionage thriller, based on John Le Carres novel, starring Richard Burton, Claire Bloom, Oskar Werner and Peter Van Eyck

programme.title: Apache Uprising (1965)
programme.desc: Western, starring Rory Calhoun as a tough-talking cowboy with a heart of gold who bravely defends fellow stagecoach passengers from a potentially lethal Indian attack. Also starring Corinne Calvet, Lon Chaney Jr and John Russell

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man insists that his family gather round his deathbed wearing Mardi Gras masks

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: I Am the Night, Colour Me Black
programme.desc: On the day an idealistic young man is to be executed for the murder of a bigot, the sun fails to shine on a small Western town. William Shatner stars

programme.title: Mr and Mrs Smith (2005)
programme.desc: An outwardly bored suburban couple lead double lives as professional assassins, both unaware of their partners secret. When they are hired to kill each other, the deadly situation puts some much-needed excitement back into their stale relationship. Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody

programme.title: Hitman (2007)
programme.desc: A genetically engineered assassin, who exists at the beck and call of a mysterious organisation, fails in his latest mission, and becomes a target himself, as security forces worldwide become aware of his existence and a rival agent is assigned to tie up loose ends. Action thriller, starring Timothy Olyphant, Dougray Scott and Olga Kurylenko

programme.title: Stratton (2017)
programme.desc: A British Special Boat Service commando tracks down an international terrorist cell. Thriller, starring Dominic Cooper, Austin Stowell and Gemma Chan

programme.title: The Legend of the Seven Golden Vampires (1974)
programme.desc: Professor Van Helsing visits the Far East, where he discovers arch-enemy Dracula has risen from the grave yet again to become the driving force behind a Chinese vampire cult. Kung-fu horror from Hammer, starring Peter Cushing, David Chiang, Julie Ege and John Forbes-Robertson

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked. Plus, in a night mission in Suffolk, the medics race to the aid of motorcyclist Nigel who has suffered serious multiple injuries

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. Shes sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Betting shop owner Les, 40, is rushed to St Georges after losing control of his car on a country road on his way to work. Cambelle, a 21-year-old plumber, has an infected cyst that may require surgery, while 67-year-old retired doctor Patrick is brought to AandE following a horse-riding accident in which he was dragged 130ft and not found for more than two hours

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. Kate heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato and finds herself slap bang in the middle of the worlds biggest food fight. Jimmy visits Italy to investigate the difference between risotto rice and long grain. Matt finds out why pork scratchings arent made from British pigs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Tiverton in the West Country to meet petrolhead Roger. Henry finds part of a tornado jet that he wants to turn into a table, while Simon finds a pair of exhaust pipes, which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couples afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following mornings feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House BandB in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. She takes her guests to a local brewery and an upmarket restaurant, where everyone seems to enjoy themselves, but the revelation that a ghost may roam the rooms of the BandB leaves some of the participants nervous

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in and around Kingston-upon-Hull, drinks brand ambassador Dan, hopes that his classic Greek grub will go down well with his guests and make for a memorable start to the week. Dans guests - florist Jayne, business manager Tony, computer games fanatic Matt and dog walker Jordanna - have their work cut out getting a word in

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second night in and around Hull, computer fanatic Matt doesnt get off to the best start when he singes his starter and his spicy main course has his guests reaching for jugs of water to cool off. Things go from bad to worse when Matts dessert elicits howls of laughter and proves inedible. After chat about superpowers and saucy sausages, the guests enjoy some sumo shenanigans in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog walking entrepreneur Jordanna hosts on the third night in and around Hull. She plans a Mexican-themed evening in a bid to prove that 22-year-olds are good cooks and can host a perfect dinner party. Her guests admire her queso fundido, and Matt is so impressed with her home-made tortillas that he offers to kiss her feet. But will a confusing dessert, stray dog hairs and rats at the table scupper her chance of winning the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth host is the self-proclaimed number one florist in Hull, Jayne, who plans to give her guests a taste of Spain with her trio of tapas, colourful paella and crema catalana. Tony gets into the spirit by dressing as a matador, but will Jayne dance into the lead will her mix of food and flamenco?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The last night heads from Hull across to Doncaster to find business manager Tony hosting with some countryside cuisine. Things dont quite go to plan when he has to stomach a large portion of blunt feedback about the authenticity of his locally sourced supper, dirty cutlery and gloopy gravy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the African-themed Foxholm BandB in North Yorkshire begins another competition, trying to prove their establishment offers the best value for money. Julie Janes and Yvonne Quinsey initially impress their guests with a cupcake class, but tempers fray when John Shields makes an unfavourable remark about German-born Sigrid

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wendy Johnson and John Shields welcome their rival hoteliers to the Pack Horse, an American diner-themed BandB in Lincolnshire, for the second round of the competition. A horse-riding session turns sour when Steve Reed takes a dislike to Nick Lawler, and matters get worse over dinner - before a pancake shortage at breakfast causes problems for the hosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Sigrid Reed host at their Glenwalden BandB in Blackpool. They hope ballroom dancing will entertain the guests, some of whom object to the pink flock wallpaper and knitted toilet roll holders. Nick Lawler seems to be warming to the owners, but one of them suspects his change of heart is all part of a cunning plan

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Nick Lawler and business partner Kate Wilson host the competition at the Winder Hall Country House BandB in the Lake District, but a clash of egos ensues when they try to lecture the other participants about how to manage their hospitality establishments, and a disastrous breakfast service leaves contestants unimpressed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer revisit two couples who were previously featured on the show. Sam and Krystle were keen to move from their rented flat in Deptford into their own place, while long-distance partners Jason and Jaye were looking for a one-bedroom pad with outside space in Clapham or Brixton to finally bring them together

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer head back to Albrighton in Shropshire to catch up with Jamie Lea and Curtis. Back in 2019 theyd reached a stalemate after buying and doing up their three-bedroom terrace home. At the time, psychology student Jamie Lea wanted to settle down and enjoy family life with their daughter Scarlett and their soon-to-be-born second child. But Curtis had itchy feet and was constantly trawling the internet for their next doer-upper. He wanted a bigger house with a better garden in the countryside for their growing family. Kirstie came up with a plan to give them the family space they needed, but with a tight Love It budget of £30,000, Curtis and Jamie Lea had to use every ounce of elbow grease and savvy to stretch it as far as possible. Meanwhile, Phils List It budget of £280,000 was equally tough. He scoured the area and found three stunning properties to win over Jamie Lea, including a huge four-bed project, but what did the couple decide to do in the end? Four years on, Phil catches up with Jamie Lea, Curtis and their growing family to find out what happened next

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Blanca starts experiencing episodes of listlessness and dizziness, unaware that the increasingly concerning Nanni is spiking her drinks. But shes distracted from her mystery symptoms when the body of a student is found on premises owned by an oil company and nobody seems to know why she might have been there. In Italian

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire, the heli-medics help a man who is fighting for his life following a cardiac arrest. A tumble on an obstacle course leaves fun-runner Vijitha with a painful open fracture. Plus, in Northumberland, seven-year-old Imogen suffers an impalement at the bike track

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE documentary series turns its attention to caring and kindness at St Georges Hospital in south-west London, highlighting altruistic acts from staff, patients and visitors alike. A 13-year-old cyclist experiencing bouts of unconsciousness is sent for a CT scan, and 84-year-old Ursula, who was born in Germany, arrives in resus having lost a lot of blood during a series of severe nose-bleeds. Plus, 76-year-old Margaret is brought in to St Georges after suffering a suspected stroke during a routine appointment at another hospital, and the doctors must quickly administer a clot-busting drug if they are to prevent further damage to her brain

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Co Durham, heli-medics battle to keep Mick alive after he has a seizure. A fun day takes a turn at the motocross track that leaves 12-year-old Ollie with a limb-threatening injury. And in the Yorkshire Dales, theres a dramatic hillside rescue for seriously-injured paraglider Alastair

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Cora, 62, arrives by air ambulance following a high-speed road accident, which left her trapped in the car for more than an hour. Her husband Rae, 65, who was driving, is brought in soon after, and staff are concerned he may have sustained serious head, neck and internal injuries. Scott, 23, has badly cut his knee after a night out, and while hes being treated, he reflects on his schizophrenia diagnosis as a teenager. Retired carpenter Richard, 68, has fallen and hit his head on the pavement, but medics also want to look into his unusually low blood pressure

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates shock reports that changing sea temperatures mean squid and chips could one day replace fish and chips as the UKs national dish, and heads to Thailand, where squid is a national obsession. Kate Quilton goes Down Under to find out about a surprising new meat coming into our supermarkets and Matt Tebbutt heads to Italy to find out how supermarkets can sell pesto at an affordable price when the traditional ingredients are famously expensive

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of the Sea Verge Hotel in Paignton, Devon, try to prove their BandB offers the best value for money. However, Tony and Chris Fulbrooks guests are far from happy, with Christine Hale complaining about the noise from the sea and scolding Chris for serving breakfast in her slippers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves on to the Portcullis Hotel in Chipping Sodbury, Gloucestershire, where mother-and-daughter owners Christine and Jenna Hale make a poor first impression by cajoling their guests into taking part in a karaoke session that runs until 2am. Matters worsen the following day, as a caricaturing workshop does little to alleviate the tension among the contestants

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Andy Scott hosts at the Orchid Hotel in Bournemouth, and takes on Richard Bailey in the boxing gym. Christine and Jenna Hale are unhappy to find foreign objects in their beds, and a spot of flirting is brought to a swift halt when the owner receives some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Orles Barn in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where owners Richard and Kelly Bailey impress their guests with the beauty and quality of the accommodation. The contestants then head to a local organic supplier to pick asparagus for their dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the weeks competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman heads to the Canary Islands to help retired architect Nick and former journalist Tim find their dream holiday home from home on Gran Canaria. Theyve been together for 10 years and love living by the sea on the Cornish coastline. Now, they hope to find a holiday bolthole that will be their perfect escape from the chilly British winters. With a budget of £250,000, Jasmine hopes to deliver their dream with any of the five properties she locates

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Lindsay and Ian find their dream holiday home in Almeria, Spain on a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps engaged couple Louise and Chris find their perfect holiday home in Manilva, Spain on a budget of £120,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Torrevieja on Spains Costa Blanca to help ex-engineer Ash and retired banker Anila find their dream holiday home. With a budget of £135,000, they want a three-bedroom property with a swimming pool that the children and grandchildren can all enjoy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-mad executive PA Julie-Ann Rayner hosts the first dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and hopes to impress her guests - science teacher Damian Loneragan, DJ Scott Langley, barmaid Steph Barrett and glamorous granny Carol Dolman - with a taste of the sea menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Carol Dolman hosts the second dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex. The glamorous grandmother hopes her scallops and roast lamb, dress to impress theme and tango lessons given by local instructors are enough to win her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Damian Loneragan hosts the third dinner party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, where he hopes his chilli-based dishes, and a lemon and ginger dessert, will help him win the £1,000 prize. However, after a disastrous main course, he goes all-out to wow his guests with science experiments in the garden

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Steph Barrett is the fourth host of this weeks competition in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and sets a 1940s dress code. The day gets off to a tricky start when she attempts to make home-made pastry for the first time, but her nan saves the day. The guests are suitably impressed by her home, and the dancing entertainment goes down even better than the food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Scott Langley hosts the final party in Southend-on-Sea, Essex, and decides to take a gamble by serving fried pigeon as his main course. He insists on an outrageous dress code for the evening, and unveils some special entertainment before the weeks winner is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Buck Inn in Malham, North Yorkshire, where mother-and-daughter team Karen and Kathryn Souter hope their BandB will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Smithson Farm in Reedley Hallows, Lancashire, where Carole and Harry Johnson hope their glampsite gives their guests a taste of the great outdoors

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Mallard House in Gilling West, North Yorkshire, where manager Olivia Skeoch and head of housekeeping Teresa Weedon hope their guests will lap up the luxury

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Dick and Liz Bradleys BandB, Bryn Derwen in Rhayader, Powys, where its all about the home-from-home experience. Harry and Carole appear to have found the perfect match but for Kathryn, the decor is disappointing. At dinner, the BandBers reflect on the week and talk about keeping in touch, but theres an uncomfortable silence from one end of the table

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time and things get personal when Olivia and Teresa of Mallard House take Harry and Carole to task over their feedback. After dramatic discoveries and cutting comments, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. Erin, a 61-year-old former cancer patient with an ear infection, is rushed to St Georges Hospital after she collapsed at home. Doctors fear the condition may have spread to her brain, and send her for a CT scan to find out more. Tony, a 70-year-old part-time DJ, arrives in AandE after being involved in a high-speed bicycle accident while training for a 100-mile charity bike ride, and Charlie, a 39-year-old cabin crew worker, turns up at the hospital complaining of unbearable pain after discharging himself during a previous visit, and removing the cast fitted to support his broken arm

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The 100th episode of the series focuses on the love between patients and their nearest and dearest. Sir John Cockburn, whos 89, arrives at St Georges with acute abdominal pain and medics think it could be an abdominal aortic aneurysm and he faces emergency surgery. Meanwhile, 68-year-old Mick and his wife Linda have been involved in a head-on car crash. Mick took the brunt of the impact and has multiple injuries from top to toe that could be life-changing. The couple fell in love after leaving previous relationships, making a happy life together in their mobile home. And 10-year-old Niall is brought to AandE after falling 8ft from a tree on a family picnic. Hes broken his arm so badly it looks like a banana, and orthopaedic doctors need to work out how to get it back in place

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The heli-medics race to assist Linda, who has suffered a heart attack on a Norfolk beach. Motocross rider Alex is in a bad way after being hit by another bike. Meanwhile, in Cumbria, 15-year-old cyclist Dan is treated for a possible skull fracture after colliding with a car on a country road

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Junior doctor Simon is concerned 40-year-old doorman Alfred, who was stabbed multiple times outside the social club where he works, may have internal injuries. Eighteen-year-old student George is brought into resus with blood coming from his ear and behaving erratically, following a fight at a party, and is sent for an urgent scan when consultant Phil becomes worried he may have a life-threatening bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The emergency room documentary continues, highlighting the stories of people facing adversity head-on. programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The AandE documentary series turns its attention to caring and kindness at St Georges Hospital in south-west London, highlighting altruistic acts from staff, patients and visitors alike. A 13-year-old cyclist experiencing bouts of unconsciousness is sent for a CT scan, and 84-year-old Ursula, who was born in Germany, arrives in resus having lost a lot of blood during a series of severe nose-bleeds. Plus, 76-year-old Margaret is brought in to St Georges after suffering a suspected stroke during a routine appointment at another hospital, and the doctors must quickly administer a clot-busting drug if they are to prevent further damage to her brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Becky, 59, is rushed in after a suspected stroke, and medics are concerned she may have had a bleed on the brain. Georgia, 19, locked herself out of her flat and lost her balance trying to climb through a second-floor window, falling 20ft on to concrete. Shes sent for an urgent CT scan with possible spinal injuries. Meanwhile, 88-year-old Edith is kept under observation after collapsing at home

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Betting shop owner Les, 40, is rushed to St Georges after losing control of his car on a country road on his way to work. Cambelle, a 21-year-old plumber, has an infected cyst that may require surgery, while 67-year-old retired doctor Patrick is brought to AandE following a horse-riding accident in which he was dragged 130ft and not found for more than two hours

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty, Kate Quilton and Matt Tebbutt present some of their favourite investigations. Kate heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato and finds herself slap bang in the middle of the worlds biggest food fight. Jimmy visits Italy to investigate the difference between risotto rice and long grain. Matt finds out why pork scratchings arent made from British pigs

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry comes across a tractor that has not run for quite a few years - but poses no problem for restorer Alan

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Tiverton in the West Country to meet petrolhead Roger. Henry finds part of a tornado jet that he wants to turn into a table, while Simon finds a pair of exhaust pipes, which he thinks could become a trendy pair of lamps

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couples afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following mornings feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House BandB in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.sub-title: Life at the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Paul Murton returns to visit more islands off the coastline, beginning with the Outer Hebrides. He resumes his journey on Eriskay, where he discovers how the remote location helped preserve a unique way of life for centuries - and also allowed locals to hide thousands of bottles of whisky from the excise men when a ship laden with the thirst-quenching cargo ran aground in 1941. The story inspired the 1949 movie Whisky Galore! Moving on to Barra, Paul goes foraging for cockles and visits the only airport in the world where scheduled flights land on the beach, then heads across to Vatersay, where he joins local fishermen trawling for lobsters

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton explores the Isle of Mull and its satellite islands to discover why they have become boltholes from the hustle and bustle of the modern world. He begins on the tidal island of Erraid, which inspired famous Scottish writer Robert Louis Stevenson, then hops over to Ulva, the final resting place of Lachlan MacQuarrie, one of the first governors of New South Wales. He then explores Mull itself, being given a whistlestop tour of the island by rally driver Louise Thomas, then travels to the mysterious little island of Inch Kenneth, where he hears the story of Nazi sympathizer Unity Mitford. He ends his tour at the remote Treshnish Islands, where he experiences a spot of puffin therapy

programme.title: Grand Tours of the Scottish Islands
programme.desc: Paul Murton explores the Isle of Mull and its satellite islands to discover why they have become boltholes from the hustle and bustle of the modern world. He begins on the tidal island of Erraid, which inspired famous Scottish writer Robert Louis Stevenson, then hops over to Ulva, the final resting place of Lachlan MacQuarrie, one of the first governors of New South Wales. He then explores Mull itself, being given a whistlestop tour of the island by rally driver Louise Thomas, then travels to the mysterious little island of Inch Kenneth, where he hears the story of Nazi sympathizer Unity Mitford. He ends his tour at the remote Treshnish Islands, where he experiences a spot of puffin therapy

programme.desc: Vanessa Simonite with what appears to be a piece of wood and a bag of bits, but which once was a beautiful mosaic table made by hand by her late husband. On hand to help repair this ultimate jigsaw puzzle is the barns ceramic expert Kirsten Ramsay with help from woodwork whizz Will Kirk. A well-loved family recipe book and an art deco clock also receive much-needed restorations

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 4
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott explore The Fens in search of treasure, ticking off five east of England counties in their trusty Vanden Plas Princess. As the competition gets down to the pointy end, they apply their business heads on but still cannot resist some shenanigans on the way. At the shops, Raj falls in love with the oldest thing hes ever found on the Road Trip, even if he cant pronounce whats written on the ticket. Irita discovers a secret door barred to the general public and discovers long-forgotten and very dusty treasures

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 5
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to the seaside in Lincolnshire, for their last chance to hit the shops before the final auction showdown. At the shops, Irita comes over all nostalgic as she stumbles across items from her childhood. She also gets her hands on some exquisite, enamelled artwork that she feels would benefit from being dismantled. Raj racks up a haul of potential purchases, but still finds time for a spot of puppetry. programme.title: Jack Hargreaves Old Country
programme.desc: Animal traditions are discussed as Jack Hargreaves witnesses the annual roundup of New Forest ponies and visits a goat farm.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Impostor Mystery
programme.desc: While Holmes and Watson are out of London on vacation, someone has taken the opportunity to impersonate Holmes - to a great profit.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Eiffel Tower
programme.desc: After a famous criminal is run over and killed by a milk wagon, Lestrade finds a coded note in the mans clothing. He asks Holmes to decipher it.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. He had a clause inserted in his will that his death must be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Fenn Street Gang
programme.desc: Dennis mixes with the wrong crowd and tries Russian bitter, landing him in Magistrate?s Court. But when Duffy, Craven, and Mr. Smith turn up to defend him, the situation only gets messier.

programme.title: The Fenn Street Gang
programme.desc: Duffy feels the strain of being apart from Sharon, but still chats up a new girl, especially since her father might be able to offer him some useful business opportunities.

programme.title: The Fenn Street Gang
programme.desc: Maureen anxiously awaits her Olevel results, vital for her nursing plans. To calm her, Duffy and Craven set up a date, but their good intentions don?t lead to a smooth outcome.

programme.title: The Gaffer
programme.desc: An old friend returns, dragging Fred into trouble and awkward loyalties.

programme.title: The Gaffer
programme.desc: With Betty on holiday, temp Rose rattles Fred and upsets the factory routine.

programme.title: The Gaffer
programme.desc: Fred tries to win overseas sales, but staff, clients and the bank manager make it hard.

programme.title: Agony
programme.sub-title: Too Much Agony, Too Little Ecstasy
programme.desc: As Janes birthday approaches, she decides to take the plunge and walk out on her broken marriage. Sitcom, starring Maureen Lipman and Simon Williams

programme.title: Agony
programme.desc: Jane returns from holiday to big surprises and problems - Andy has been replaced at the radio station by a cynic, Rob and Michael want her out of their flat, and Laurence has attempted to meet someone via a dating service. Sitcom, starring Maureen Lipman

programme.title: Agony
programme.desc: Val decides to make a blue movie, after being advised by her horoscope for the week that theres a money making scheme connected with the colour blue awaiting her,

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Craig and Richard search for Sharron, who has disappeared while on holiday in Cornwall - and encounter spooky goings-on at an imposing manor. Fantasy drama, starring William Gaunt, Alexandra Bastedo and Stuart Damon

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Helen gives shelter to a battered wife and her sons, but trouble looms when the womans husband appears. Brigit Forsyth and Michael Elphick star

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans visit a bizarre planet where the past and the future are apparently interchangeable. Starring Martin Landau and Barbara Bain

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The crew is infected by a mysterious illness, and Tony must intervene before it is too late. Sci-fi adventure starring Martin Landau, Barbara Bain, Tony Anholt and Dave Prowse

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russell investigates the death of a technician and makes a disturbing discovery about one of the Moonbase Alpha crew. Sci-fi adventure, starring Barbara Bain

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: Hannah wants to take driving lessons and Faith reckons it is about time Joe learned about contraception - while Bill wishes he had taken precautions much earlier. Comedy, with James Bolam, Lynda Bellingham and Belinda Lang

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: Faith and her friend Hilary take a break at a health farm, giving Bill the opportunity to make a few changes in the house while they are away. Celia Imrie guest stars, with James Bolam, Lynda Bellingham and Belinda Lang

programme.title: Second Thoughts
programme.desc: Faith is furious when Bill sells his old flat to Liza, while he is not amused to be referred to by her former married name - and they both vent their frustrations at the school fete. Comedy, with James Bolam, Lynda Bellingham and Belinda Lang

programme.title: The Brian Conley Show

programme.desc: As part of the Stones mammoth 1981 American tour, the rock band arrived in Chicago prior to playing three nights at the Rosemont Horizon. programme.title: The Stones in Exile
programme.desc: Alan Yentob visits France to introduce a film documenting the recording of the Rolling Stones 1972 album Exile on Main Street. Having faced ruin due to the size of their unpaid tax bills, the Stones relocated to the French Riviera to make the album, before completing the recording in Los Angeles - with Mick Jagger also finding time to get married in St Tropez. Alongside rare home-movie footage of the band at work, there are also interviews with Jagger, Keith Richards, Bill Wyman and Charlie Watts

programme.desc: A chauffeurs daughter falls for her fathers playboy employer, but when he rejects her she flees to Paris. On her return, however, he is smitten by the alluring woman she has become - even though he is about to be married. To ensure the wedding takes place, his older brother decides to woo the beauty himself. Comedy, starring Audrey Hepburn, William Holden, Humphrey Bogart and Walter Hampden

programme.title: Cream Reunion Concert

programme.title: The Yardbirds
programme.desc: A history of the rock band, which was the launching pad for guitarists Eric Clapton, Jeff Beck and Jimmy Page. With contributions by Ronnie Wood, Brian May and Alice Cooper

programme.title: Buddy Holly: Rave On
programme.desc: Rock n roll started with Elvis, but some believe that pop music started with Buddy Holly and the Crickets. As a songwriter, Holly revolutionised the genre by introducing dynamic new rhythms and unpredictable melodies beyond its traditional blues roots. In his songs written and recorded in the late 50s, it is already possible to hear the beat group sound of the 1960s, and beyond. This documentary tells the story of Hollys tragically short life and career through interviews with those who knew him and worked with him. Contributors include Don McLean, Paul Anka, Don Everly, Hank Marvin and Bob Harris

programme.title: Johnny Cash - A Night to Remember Live 1973
programme.desc: A performance by the country star at Los Angeles Ahmanson Theatre, with songs including Big River, Jackson, Folsom Prison Blues, A Boy Named Sue and Sunday Morning Coming Down

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: How album artwork has defined the images of British bands including Pink Floyd and the Sex Pistols. With contributions by Boy George, Storm Thorgerson and Steve Norman

programme.title: Classic Albums

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Gaffney allows a murder site to be washed down prematurely, destroying evidence and bringing him into conflict with Pembleton - who is promptly placed in charge of the case. Gritty police drama, starring Andre Braugher, Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Pembleton encounters a murder witness who has multiple personalities - and later proves to be the killer. Meanwhile, Beau spends time with his family and decides to break up with Megan. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Sort Of

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixhams annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. Landlady Pat Seddon is not looking forward to the raucous celebrations, however, and decides to reminisce about past race days instead. The programme also meets Matt Kimble, a graduate who gave up on his plan to become a PE teacher and decided to follow his ancestors into the fishing trade instead

programme.title: Fish Town

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Trip to Italy (2014)
programme.desc: Sequel to improvised comedy The Trip, with Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon once again playing versions of themselves. The two comedy actors are asked to embark on another round of restaurant reviews for a Sunday newspaper, this time in Italy. Steve is on hiatus from his American TV series and isnt drinking while Rob is looking to unwind with his time away from his young family

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: A youth admits to murdering a woman killed during a botched hold-up, but Howard is convinced his confession does not hold water. Gritty police drama, starring Daniel Baldwin, Ned Beatty and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Following a series of uncharacteristic messages, Sabi and Aqsa head home to check in on their mum, prompting Sabi to bare their truth

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Shenandoah (1965)
programme.desc: A Virginian farmer is left to raise seven children after his wife dies. He tries to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but when Union troops abduct his son, and his son-in-law enlists with the Confederates, he is unable to maintain his neutral stance and is dragged into the conflict. Western, starring James Stewart, Doug McClure, Rosemary Forsyth, Katharine Ross and Patrick Wayne

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Black Dog (2024)
programme.desc: As part of a patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, former stunt motorcyclist Lang bonds with a hound. Drama, starring Eddie Peng and Tong Liya. In Chinese with English subtitles

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powells mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girls life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 2 (2004)
programme.desc: Peter Parker continues his fight for justice, but unrequited love and personal worries take their toll and he is tempted to abandon his web-slinging alter ego. However, the arrival of deadly new bad guy Doctor Octopus plunges him into a race against time to save New York. Comic-book adventure sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Alfred Molina, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Spider-Man 3 (2007)
programme.desc: A sinister alien parasite brings out the web-slinging heros darker side, filling him with thoughts of revenge on his uncles murderer, the shape-shifting Sandman. Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Black Dog (2024)
programme.desc: As part of a patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, former stunt motorcyclist Lang bonds with a hound. Drama, starring Eddie Peng and Tong Liya. In Chinese with English subtitles

programme.title: Eye in the Sky (2015)
programme.desc: Colonel Katherine Powells mission to wipe out a terrorist cell in Kenya is complicated when a girl enters the blast radius of the intended drone strike. Powell has to decide between sacrificing the girls life or letting the terrorists flee to carry out more atrocities. Thriller, starring Helen Mirren, Alan Rickman and Aaron Paul

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies (2018)
programme.desc: Five teenage superheroes, miffed by the fact they arent deemed worthy enough for their own big screen films, set out to prove themselves by tackling the villainous Slade and his maniacal plan for world domination. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Greg Cipes, Scott Menville, Khary Payton, Will Arnett and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit in The Curse of the Were-Rabbit (2005)
programme.desc: Inventor Wallace and his canine sidekick Gromit have set up a pest-control service, and are called in to stop rabbits overrunning a garden show. However, the pair are overwhelmed when a destructive giant bunny arrives on the scene, while an interfering aristocrat contrives to make matters worse. Nick Parks Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Peter Sallis, Ralph Fiennes and Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

Meanwhile, he also has to contend with the challenge of his best friend following in his fathers villainous footsteps - and a jealous rival developing superpowers of his own. Superhero sequel, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst and James Franco

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Sharp Corner (2024)
programme.desc: Josh McCall is a family man who becomes obsessed with saving the lives of the car accident victims on the sharp corner in front of his house. Its an obsession that could cost him everything. Writer/director Jason Buxtons thriller, starring Ben Foster, Cobie Smulders and Gavin Drea

programme.title: The Dry (2020)
programme.desc: Federal agent Aaron Falk returns to his drought-stricken home town after an absence of more than 20 years to attend the funeral of his childhood friend. But his arrival opens up a decades-old wound - the unsolved death of a teenage girl. Crime drama, starring Eric Bana and Genevieve OReilly

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.desc: How a pair of fake registration plates on a getaway car helped a detective to solve a series of robberies. Plus, footage of a supermarket cashier standing up to armed robbers

programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood reveals how the police and the public are using CCTV evidence and technology to catch criminals in the act. programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Inspired by the stories of his shipwrecked relatives, Ross heads up to the Royal Navys historic naval base in the far northerly Orkney Islands, Scapa Flow. Here, Ross and dive supervisor Neil Brock link up with expert local dive guide Emily Turton and head out into the water to dive on Second World War wrecks. Ross and Emily explore a captured German scout ship called the F2 and recover a slew of artefacts that could be linked to Rosss two relatives who died serving in the Royal Navy during the conflict. Ross investigates how Winston Churchill hit upon a revolutionary tactic to defend Scapa Flow from U-boat attacks, as the wreck of the sunken SS Tabarka finally gives up its secrets

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: East: Stone Age Engineering and Battle of Bullecourt
programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates the best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the East of the UK, including an ancient lost monument as old as Stonehenge uncovered in Suffolk, a dig at the site of Britains first tank battle, and a coin hoard that offers an insight into the effect the English civil war had on the lives of ordinary people

programme.desc: The Douglas A-1 Skyraider, an aircraft capable of delivering the payload of a B-17, in a single post war air frame. The many variants of this single-piston engined fighter bomber helped dominate the air-to-ground attack role in Vietnam, earning itself quite a reputation

programme.title: Historys Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: The Grumman Avenger, which was the most important carrier-based torpedo bomber on American and British carriers throughout the Second World War. They were also the biggest and heaviest carrier aircraft of the conflict

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: West: Roman Bathhouse and Hessian Camp
programme.desc: Alice Roberts investigates the best archaeological discoveries of 2018 from the West of the UK, including the biggest maritime excavation since the Mary Rose which revealed the extraordinary story of the HMS Invincible, a buried German military camp in Hampshire, and a monumental Roman Bathhouse in Silchester

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts sets off across Hadrians Wall to reveal the forgotten story of the Roman Armys secret weapon in Britain - their cavalry. The programme also follows team of archaeologists and historical re-enactors as they attempt to re-stage a Roman cavalry tournament for a public display in Carlisle

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor travels dives even deeper on shipwrecks of major historical importance, exploring the remnants of some of the most significant moments in British history. He dives on shipwrecks around the British coastline to reveal some of the nations murkiest and best-kept secrets, beginning with the site of Britains most famous wreck - the Mary Rose. Ross is accompanied by dive master Neil Brock and tank expert and safety diver Mark Culwick

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross continues his diving quest in the crystal clear waters of the Red Sea off the coast of Egypt. Its a deeply personal journey as his grandfather fought in the North Africa campaign during ther Second World War

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: How, since the dawn of aviation, pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky. Accounts include UFOs taking control of their aircraft and entire jets disappearing into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The ancient mysteries that exist on the islands of Malta, which could be connected to alien visitation. These are enormous, megalithic structures and a vast underground complex containing the remains of what some believe to be otherworldly beings

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: How the capture of a key Nazi uncovered shocking realities. Amid demands for accountability, spymistress Vera Atkins and her team had to navigate murky waters to confront uncomfortable truths

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Runes are the letters of an ancient Germanic writing. Himmler made rune studies obligatory for SS officers as he believed they held mystical power and even placed protective runes on SS uniforms and buildings

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids
programme.desc: Detailing how an elite group of British paratroopers managed to launch a midnight raid in order to capture Hitlers unusual radar equipment

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.desc: The Battle of Thermopylae, fought in 480 BC between the Achaemenid Persian Empire under Xerxes I and an alliance of Greek city-states led by Sparta under Leonidas I. The Persians ultimately claimed victory

programme.title: Clash of Ancient Warriors
programme.sub-title: The Battle of the Teutoburg Forest
programme.desc: The Battle of Teutoburg Forest, contested in 9AD, when an alliance of Germanic peoples ambushed Roman legions and their auxiliaries. Romes eventual defeat not only stopped the growth of its empire, but also created the Latin-Germanic divide that persists in Western Europe to this day

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective. This episode recalls how a social protest turned into a racist and anti-Jewish movement during the 1920s. The NSDAP deliberately used emotions to gain the loyalty of the people

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Events of 1933 and 1934 when President Hindenburg signed a decree in 1933 that suspended freedom of speech. It would be one of his last actions before his death from lung cancer. Also in this era, the first concentration camps for political opponents were set up

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: How, since the dawn of aviation, pilots have experienced unexplainable events in the sky. Accounts include UFOs taking control of their aircraft and entire jets disappearing into thin air

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The worlds top 10 mysterious devices, from strange, grooved disks found in a cave in China to an ancient Greek computer to an incredible crystal skull unearthed in Mexico

programme.title: The Nostradamus Effect
programme.desc: An attempt to identify the third antichrist, based on clues in the alleged prophets writings apparently indicating that Napoleon and Hitler would be the first two

programme.title: Hitlers Coup 1923
programme.desc: The infamous Beer Hall Putsch of November 1923, an attempt by Adolf Hitler to take power in Germany by force. Though it failed, it was a day that would change the world for ever, birthing Hitlers regime

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. programme.title: Troy Story
programme.desc: Part two of two. The legend of the Trojan War, a conflict between the ancient Greeks and the city of Troy, sparked by the abduction of Helen of Sparta by the Trojan prince Paris. In 1874, Heinrich Schliemann announced he had found Troy, setting in motion a golden age of archaeology where a lost Bronze Age world was also rediscovered. Since then, many archaeologists have challenged his claims, but in every generation new findings have kept the search for the city alive. This documentary brings the search up to date drawing upon 21st-century science and archaeology to pinpoint its location

programme.desc: Modern techniques are called upon to investigate the mysteries of the most legendary battles from ancient times. The Battle of Cannae was a major battle of the Second Punic War, taking place in August 216 BC near the town of Cannae in Apulia in south-east Italy. The Carthaginian army under Hannibal destroyed a numerically superior Roman army under command of the consuls Lucius Aemilius Paullus and Gaius Terentius Varro

programme.desc: Part one of two. Ramses the Great is one of the most emblematic pharaohs of Ancient Egypt, who saw in the construction of the city of Pi-Ramses a way to reach power. Professor Henning Franzmeier and his team have recently discovered a splendid palace and treasure room inside the city walls. This documentary follows this unprecedented mission for eight weeks and reveals for the first time the true history of the lost city of Ramses the Great

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Perched high on a volcanic crag overlooking the River Forth, Stirling has long been one of the most strategically important castles in Britain. Guarding the gateway to the Highlands, its battle-scarred walls have witnessed savagery and chivalry, intrigue, alchemy, adultery and murder. With the aid of location filming, aerial shots and dramatic reconstructions, Dan Jones examines the history of this stronghold and relates the stories of some of the powerful characters who have owned it over the centuries

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Carrickfergus Castle in Co Antrim, one of the most ancient castles in Northern Ireland and a stronghold key to understanding the tempestuous relationship between Britain and Ireland. Dan travels to Rathlin island, where he reveals how hundreds of women and children were massacred in the name of Elizabeth I, and visits the tomb of former governor Arthur Chichester, who began a new colonisation strategy using scorched earth tactics and laid waste to much of the land surrounding the town

programme.title: Royal Kill List

Sheila Atim is the storyteller for the Royalists and Jared Harris for the Regicides. With Joseph Fiennes

programme.title: Royal Kill List

Dramatised-documentary, featuring Sheila Atim, Jared Harris and Joseph Fiennes
