programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands with Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Eoin is back in his Galway hooker and sails to the islands off Co Kerry, before heading south to his home waters off Cork and ending his journey at Fastnet Rock

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster continues his bug-eyed view of the world of creepy-crawlies, revealing how predators defuse the defences of their prey. Highlights include the cockroach wasp, busy preparing a tasty - and very live - treat for its young, the whirligig beetle, which employs a water-based radar system, and the jumping portia spider, which feeds on other arachnids

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A close-up view of sex, bug-style, as David Attenborough talks viewers through the different ways in which creepy-crawlies reproduce. Size matters for the minuscule male orb spider, creepily sneaking up on its intended and trying to mate without her noticing, while theres no rest for the lothario-like butterfly, which has plenty of notches on its proverbial bedpost. However, the harvestman spider has no use for sex at all, and reproduces by cloning itself

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough shifts the focus to bugs that prefer co-operation rather than conflict. They include burrowing cockroaches, the suitably named social spiders - which share a 30-metre web - the queen bee and her happy hive of workers and green ants pulling together to build a nest

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster concludes his close-up examination of the creepy-crawly world, shifting focus to the bugs ultimate invention - the colony. Key residents of these minuscule mega-cities include honey bees, termites, leafcutter ants - who have a knack for farming - and their Argentine cousins, members of a community so vast it spans an entire continent

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Documentary about three dynasties of lions, with the MK pride defending the territory they have held for years from the all-male Nomad pride and the all-female Hollywood pride

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Two-party documentary featuring aerial footage of the Australian wilderness, beginning with the vast, dry plains of the interior, featuring the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo

programme.title: Over Australia
programme.desc: Part two of two. Aerial footage of the Great Dividing Range, spanning thousands of miles along the eastern edge of Australia and separating two very different worlds

programme.title: The Kimberley: Australias Wild West
programme.desc: Stepping into the wild and exploring Earths greatest savannah, cameras capture ancient fire traditions and a sugar gliders daring escape from the flames

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: Documentary about three dynasties of lions, with the MK pride defending the territory they have held for years from the all-male Nomad pride and the all-female Hollywood pride

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: Animals sense and interpret their world in ways that are far beyond our human capabilities. This documentary series begins by exploring animal vision, a world where dragonflies see in almost every direction, a tiny crustacean boasts hexnocular vision and pigeons see 10 times the colour that humans can

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: The documentary asks what makes a truly super-powered animal, scouring the globe for the strangest and most surprising animal skills and, in a round of competitive challenges, revealing which creature holds the title for super strength, most toxic, master of disguise, greatest escape artist and master builder

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: The amazing world of what animals really see with their extraordinary senses, thanks to remarkable CGI and innovative film techniques

programme.title: Zombieland (2009)
programme.desc: A mutated virus sweeps across America, turning most of the population into hideous flesh-eating zombies. A hard-drinking fearless adventurer leads a small band of young survivors on a perilous journey through the wasteland in search of a safe haven. Comedy horror, with Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg, Emma Stone and Abigail Breslin

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: An American youngster goes to live in China with his mother, where he becomes an outsider and falls foul of the local bullies. He receives help from the kindly school caretaker, who turns out to be a kung fu master and offers to train the boy to defend himself. Martial arts drama, with Jaden Smith and Jackie Chan

programme.title: Karate Kid: Legends (2025)
programme.desc: Kung fu prodigy Li Fong moves to New York City with his mother and befriends his classmate, Mia. But Connor Day, a local karate champion, provokes Li and publicly humiliates him. Li seeks guidance from his mentor, the kung fu master Mr Han, who reaches out to Daniel LaRusso, convincing the original Karate Kid to teach Li the principles of Miyagi Karate. Drama sequel, starring Jackie Chan, Ben Wang and Ralph Macchio

programme.title: Zombieland (2009)
programme.desc: A mutated virus sweeps across America, turning most of the population into hideous flesh-eating zombies. A hard-drinking fearless adventurer leads a small band of young survivors on a perilous journey through the wasteland in search of a safe haven. Comedy horror, with Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg, Emma Stone and Abigail Breslin

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap (2019)
programme.desc: A decade after they joined forces, survivors Tallahassee, Columbus, Wichita and Little Rock have become experts in identifying and disposing assorted zombies. They set up their new home in the abandoned White House, but after Little Rock heads to Graceland, the team attempts to save her from a group of super zombies. Director Ruben Fleischers comedy horror sequel, starring Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg and Emma Stone

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021)
programme.desc: With the web-slingers identity now revealed to the world, Peter Parker asks Doctor Strange for magical help to undo the damage. However, a spell gone wrong unleashes dangerous foes from parallel universes on the world. Comic-book adventure sequel, starring Tom Holland, Zendaya and Benedict Cumberbatch, with Willem Dafoe, Jamie Foxx and Alfred Molina among the stars of past Spider-Man movies reprising their roles

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012)
programme.desc: A gifted teenager investigates the secrets hidden in his dead parents past, leading him to a mysterious corporation and an incident that imbues him with superhuman powers. A personal tragedy drives him to use his new-found abilities to fight crime, and he is soon drawn into a deadly battle against a former colleague of his father, who has undergone a devastating transformation of his own. Superhero adventure reboot, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone and Rhys Ifans

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014)
programme.desc: The webslinging hero battles a powerful new enemy when a downtrodden engineer develops lethal electrical powers, which he unleashes on those he believes have betrayed him. As if that wasnt enough to keep him busy, he faces an even greater threat when he is reunited with an unstable old friend who has been charged with a sinister mission by his dying father, leading to a series of tense confrontations that threaten to change his life for ever. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx and Dane DeHaan

programme.title: Twister (1996)
programme.desc: A storm-chaser and her estranged husband are brought together in a joint project to monitor the path of an oncoming tornado - but the pair face a race against the clock as a rival government-backed group with hi-tech resources tries to beat them to it. Action thriller, starring Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton, Cary Elwes, Jami Gertz and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Twisters (2024)
programme.desc: Meteorologist Kate Cooper crosses paths with social media star Tyler Owens. He recklessly chases storms with his crew and gleefully posts their daredevil exploits, as multiple storm systems converge over central Oklahoma. Standalone disaster sequel, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones and Glen Powell

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap (2019)
programme.desc: A decade after they joined forces, survivors Tallahassee, Columbus, Wichita and Little Rock have become experts in identifying and disposing assorted zombies. They set up their new home in the abandoned White House, but after Little Rock heads to Graceland, the team attempts to save her from a group of super zombies. Director Ruben Fleischers comedy horror sequel, starring Woody Harrelson, Jesse Eisenberg and Emma Stone

programme.title: Twister (1996)

Action thriller, starring Helen Hunt, Bill Paxton, Cary Elwes, Jami Gertz and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

He enjoys an Indian-style mushy peas and his favourite bitter in Leeds, reminiscing about his literary hero John Betjeman. Plus, he visits the UKs biggest tofu factory and at home cooks vegetarian pad Thai and paneer jalfrezi

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Former Emmerdale actress Charlie Hardwick shows Robson the hidden gems of the East Durham coastline. The pair take an art class on the sand, a wellness choir teacher shows how singing outdoors can be good for mind and body, and Robson signs up for a session with a forest bathing instructor among the trees of Hamsterley Forest

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Flo Headlam come up with plans to transform a characterless garden in Daventry into a curvy, naturalistic oasis with a spiritual, Dartmoor-inspired atmosphere

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: Dave is in Birmingham, working with a reinforced concrete fire surround

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: DIY expert Dave Wellman is in Lancashire, fixing a stone cottage patio wall

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head for rural Cornwall, where they create a spectacular contemporary garden for Chris Finney, a former serviceman who was awarded the George Cross in 2003. A space age-inspired area - complete with solar dome - will test Chriss knowledge as a novice gardener, and provide a stimulating haven for his young family

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Gosport couple Nicola and David met on stage so they want the team to turn their unloved garden into the ultimate, theatrical showstopper. Can Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull give them a space to entertain their friends and perform some of their amateur dramatic favourites, while also providing a quiet haven for wildlife, for £6,000?

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are in Ilkeston where Martin and Neil need help renovating their garden with a budget of £4,000. The pair are hoping for something quirky with a blend of Victorian, Regency and Elizabethan styles to echo design elements from their home

programme.title: Frustrated Wives (1974)
programme.desc: A pair of frustrated housewives who are bored and neglected by their husbands decide to go to a sex clinic in the country. Contains nudity.

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver (1976)
programme.desc: A cabbys hectic sex life suddenly becomes even more complicated than usual thanks to his unwitting involvement in a jewel robbery. British sex comedy, starring Barry Evans, Diana Dors and Liz Fraser

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts buyers bid for Oasis lyrics hand-written by frontman Noel Gallagher for his brother Liam, a pair of Nike trainers with a £4,000 reserve, a sculpture by British artist Anish Kapoor and some vintage Louis Vuitton luggage with an interesting history

programme.title: Highclere: The Real Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Carnarvon along with their staff turn the castle into a winter wonderland with their biggest-ever tree in the grand saloon and a festive cocktail masterclass hosted by butler Louis. Lady Carnarvon carves out some family time away from the public as she gathers loved ones around the tree for a festive get together

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Antiques valuer Caroline Hawley, trader Tony Wong and furniture designer Nessa Doran OReilly head to Skipton to find some bargains. Once the day is done they have to try and flip items - which include some horse kneepads - for a profit

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Darrel and Michelle want to bring Cyprus to Devizes to remind them of happy times spent there as a family. Darrel is keen to have the sound of water somewhere in the garden and Michelle hopes there will be room for an olive tree to recreate that Mediterranean vibe. They want to incorporate their hot tub and their garden furniture to make it a comfortable space for themselves and their three grown-up children and to entertain their friends. Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull are up for the challenge, and set about realising the couples dreams on a budget of £3,000

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Lee Burkhill are in Ilkeston where Martin and Neil need help renovating their garden with a budget of £4,000. The pair are hoping for something quirky with a blend of Victorian, Regency and Elizabethan styles to echo design elements from their home

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Documentary following antiques as they are restored for sale at Castle Durrow. Expert jeweller Frances appraises a beautiful five-diamond platinum sparkler, and a Fender guitar signed by the Rolling Stones piques the interest of a dealer

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Newlywed couple Tessa and Robin juggle running a 48-bedroom castle and 50 acres of land with a special pair of Royal Highlander cows. In the auction room, a small but perfectly formed painting by one of the worlds most famous artists, John Constable, is ready for auction. Silver enthusiast Oliver desperately hopes that a late 19th-century Japanese silver punchbowl will be coming home with him, while auctioneer Michael needs to sell a 1930s Philco radio that props-buyer Bridie and her mother Sara have fallen in love with

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Chris gets his hands on an inscribed Egyptian amulet and gives trainee auctioneer James a masterclass in ancient signs and symbols. A historical silver pin cushion, which was once owned by a leading lady of the Irish Arts and Crafts movement, piques the interest of competing buyers. Plus, auctioneer James gets up close and personal with the inner workings of some valuable watches

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: A mysterious pencil sketch of an anonymous couple by acclaimed artist Sean Keating enchants rival bidders Helen and David, but only auctioneer Michaels hammer can seal its fate. Gloster house owners and self-confessed auction addicts Tom and Mary are on the hunt for some antique gems for their 300-year-old home, while cabinetmaker Kieran restores a classic Victorian Cheval mirror for the sale

programme.title: Futtocks End (1970)
programme.desc: A general invites a motley group of guests to stay at his country estate - and chaos ensues. Silent comedy. starring Ronnie Barker, Michael Hordern and Roger Livesey

programme.title: Buster (1988)
programme.desc: Fact-based crime drama about the life of Buster Edwards, a member of the gang responsible for the Great Train Robbery. Going on the run after the notorious heist, he flees to Mexico with his family. However, his homesick wife struggles to adapt to her new life, leaving the outlaw with a difficult choice. Starring Phil Collins, Julie Walters, Sheila Hancock, Larry Lamb and Ralph Brown

programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-husband for racking up over $4,000 in unpaid toll bills; he claims he had no money to eat let alone pay toll charges.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A man shares the dark side of the rideshare business as he prepares to file for bankruptcy after being sued for car-related damages.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A womans assault charges send a man to prison for three years; the mans wife allegedly assaults her once he is out.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman sues the father of her son after he and his new lover allegedly take advantage of her offer to buy Christmas gifts for their children.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: The Judge says anyone foolish enough to co-sign on a lease for a bunch of kids cant get one on their own!

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Confession of Murder
programme.desc: The case of Katie Rackliff, who was murdered by Sharon Carr in Farnborough. Katie was found the next day, it took nearly five years - and Carrs own confession - to solve the case.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Worlds End Murders
programme.desc: The story of two Edinburgh teens who vanished after leaving the Worlds End pub in 1977; their bodies were found miles apart. A 37-year forensic hunt finally solved the case.

programme.title: Britains Countryside Killers
programme.desc: The murder of Emma Caldwell, whose body was found in Limefield Woods in 2005. Iain Packer, a sign installer with a violent past, evaded justice for years.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.sub-title: James McElroy: The Killer Who Turned on his Friends
programme.desc: The case of teenager James McElroy, who was on holiday with his friends, which became a nightmare when he turned on the boys and murdered them with a shotgun.

programme.title: Murder UK
programme.desc: The story of Scottish entrepreneur Nat Fraser, whose odd behaviour raises suspicion when his wife Arlene vanishes. Police suspect him but need evidence.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Britains Youngest Contract Killer
programme.desc: The story of Gulistan Subasi, who was shot dead on her mothers doorstep in Hackney in 2010. The killing was a contract hit, and forensic work led to the killers conviction.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: The story of a hiker who was seriously injured after falling 200ft down a mineshaft in Cornwall, and a group of children forced to run for cover when a firework display goes wrong.

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Presenter Nick Knowles meets a married couple who were catapulted metres through the air when a motorbike hit a car, presenting CCTV footage of the moment it happened, and finds out their story of rescue and recovery

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A man is filmed while being rescued from the northern Pacific after enduring 90 minutes alone in the cold waters. Plus, a road worker tells the tale of what happens when drivers fail to see traffic cones

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera

programme.desc: A couple claim their Airbnb rental was so hot the toilet water boiled and one suffered heatstroke; they sue for medical bills.

programme.desc: A newlywed sues a bridal-shop owner for delivering an allegedly damaged, custom-made wedding gown.

programme.desc: A teenager insists that she took out a restraining on her ex-girlfriend, but her ex-roommate claims they are still dating and sues her for moving costs.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: After serving time, a young man must find a safe place to live. Instead, he is kicked out and accused of being disrespectful.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Newport Revenge Murder
programme.desc: A look at how an assault investigation jeopardises Robert Henry Davies new life, and a reign of terror begins in Newport, culminating in a murder.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Saturday Night Strangler
programme.desc: A look at the case of Joseph Kappen, who murdered three young women in South Wales in 1973.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Railway Killers
programme.desc: Jackie Malton examines the case of John Duffy and David Mulcahy, who murdered three women across London in the 1980s before both were convicted in 2001.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Bus Stop Rapist
programme.desc: A look at an attack in Nottingham which lead to an investigation which lasted nearly a quarter of a century. In time, DNA profiling would help to close the case.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: The Longest Murder Trial
programme.desc: The story of the murder of Lynette White - how her death led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time, and how police work and DNA eventually led to her killer.

programme.title: UK Crime Files: Anagram Serial Killer
programme.desc: Jackie Malton revisits the case of Scottish serial killer Peter Tobin, meeting the Glasgow officers and forensic scientists who put him behind bars for the first time on camera.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyres UK Killer Evidence
programme.desc: The case of Jessica McGraa, whose murder in Aberdeen showed the risks to sex workers and the role of forensics in convictions.

programme.title: Fatal Fraud
programme.desc: The story of businessman Alan Helmick, who was found dead in his home, leading the Police to uncover a tangled web of fraud and theft.

programme.title: Handsome Devils

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A zombie movie being filmed on the island ends in real-life horror when a stand-in is poisoned - and new detective inspector Humphrey soon deduces that the unfortunate victim was not the killers intended target. He believes the culprit was after lead actress Lexi Cunningham, but the murder plot went wrong. The Caribbean cops focus their attention on three suspects - film director Carl Collins, screenwriter Arnold Finch and production assistant Susie Jenkins. But why would any of them want the star dead? Michelle Ryan, Peter Davison and Hannah Tointon guest star

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for Ardal OHanlon as Irish detective Jack Mooney working on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. And so it appears this week as someone from JPs past is caught red-handed at a murder scene, raking up old memories for the young officer. But can the DI unravel the complex mystery to get at the truth? Tobi Bakare and Danny John-Jules co-star, with guest appearances from Ralph Brown and Adjoa Andoh

programme.desc: When Lady Felicia invites a prestigious group of writers to Montague, her hopes of being published are eclipsed by murder. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.sub-title: O Thou Invisible Spirit of Wine
programme.desc: Frank and Lu are hired to locate a photograph stolen from a local pub, whose owner is in the middle of a feud with another local family - only for events to take a deadly turn

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu delve into the ultra-competitive world of private tutoring, while a reunion with an old Rada friend, presents Sebastian with a choice about his future that could change everything for the agency. Tamzin Outhwaite guest stars, with Mark Benton and Jo Joyner

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When a lawyer dies of an overdose, Sabrina and the team track a batch of deadly heroin sweeping through Surrey. Crime drama, starring Supinder Wraich

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The clerical sleuth investigates staff at the local health spa when an ex-employee is found murdered. Crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, with Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A stag do ends in tragedy when the host of a celebratory fishing trip is found harpooned on a beach the following morning. As the boat never moved, DI Neville Parker and his team struggle to determine how anyone in attendance could have been responsible. Caribbean-set detective drama, starring Ralf Little and Josephine Jobert

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest joins forces with Flambeau to hunt for a priceless holy relic, while a new nemesis lurks in the shadows. Mystery drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Richard Poole meets up with a group of old university friends who have arrived on the island for a reunion, only for tragedy to strike when the man who has solved so many murders becomes the victim. Faced with such a sensitive crime, the commissioner quickly drafts in another British inspector to help the team get to the bottom of the mystery. It soon becomes clear that the newcomer, Humphrey Goodman, is just as eccentric as Poole - but he is also just as bright, and wastes no time questioning the partygoers, all of whom are prime suspects, while pondering the biggest mystery of all - how did the culprit commit the crime in full view of all the other guests? Kris Marshall joins the cast, with Ben Miller, Sara Martins and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Murdochs housewarming party is cut short when a man is cooked to the point of exploding in a closet-sized microwave prototype. Return of the crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Julia refuses to accept the blame when one of her patients dies after surgery, and her investigations reveal an unusual pattern of deaths among alcoholics on the ward

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A guest at Higgins and Ruths wedding makes repeated attempts to kill the groom, but that is just the beginning of the machinations taking place at the Newsome estate

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are joined by actress and presenter Mel Giedroyc, heavyweight boxer David Haye, actor-musician Martin Kemp and comedian Romesh Ranganathan. As usual, the participants aim to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory and the dubious honour of being dubbed host Rob Brydons liar of the week

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Johnny fills in for Moira at the annual Mayors Roast. David distracts Moira from finding out that Stevie and Patrick are taking private dancing lessons. Sitcom, starring Eugene Levy

programme.desc: Patrick attempts to take David on a romantic hike, while Johnny suffers a health scare that sends everybody into panic mode

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel travel along more than 1,200 miles of hazardous roads in Ethiopia on a journey to Aksum, the countrys holiest place. However, they have to contend with more than fatigue and unreliable terrain to reach their destination, as they encounter drug-taking truck drivers, suffer a disastrous breakdown and start to run out of fuel at the worst possible time

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Documentary series following a cast of Australian road train drivers as they haul cargo across the Outback - the drivers are often away from their families for weeks at a time chasing contracts along some of the world?s longest roads. The drivers all have highly specialised road skills and knowledge of the local environment - with their trailers in tow, they battle unforgiving terrain and weather conditions to deliver food, cattle and construction supplies to those who need it the most.

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the Fowey Estuary, one of Cornwalls hidden secrets, joining a friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the buildings along the riverbank. He discovers the areas history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A Cuban woman crosses the bridge in the hope of being granted political asylum in America, while officers in Laredo stop three students carrying something unusual in their car

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Customs and Border Protection officers are stunned when they discover more than $2million of cocaine mixed in with gallons of household paint and bottles of beer

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorbike fan takes on the challenge of building the worlds fastest soapbox racer in an attempt to set a new speed record using just the pull of gravity and a tarmac road. To get to grips with going blisteringly fast on a public road, Guy tries his hand at street luge with former global champion Helene Schmit, before joining his team of engineers to explore the science of rolling resistance and the importance of tyre pressure. Armed with what they believe to be the perfect formula, they produce a unique soapbox cart inspired by Mother Nature and, after training with the Team GB womens bobsled pair, confidence is high - but are disaster and mayhem just around the corner?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May encounter artillery shells, corsets and classic hot hatchbacks as they take a nostalgic look at French company Peugeot, while Richard Hammond is at the test track to compare the Porsche Cayman GTS with the latest Chevrolet Corvette. James also takes the 950bhp LaFerrari hybrid hypercar out for a spin in Italy, and singer Olly Murs is the Star in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond is dropped into the remote, frozen wastes of Canada to test a watch with a built-in emergency beacon. The distress signal is sent directly to Jeremy Clarkson and James May, who get their hands on two machines and set off on an epic adventure to find their colleague. Jeremy puts the 471bhp Lexus RC F coupe thought its paces, and actress Gillian Anderson takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to create a restaurant-quality meal on the tightest of budgets. They pick up some insider tips from Michelin-starred chef David Everitt-Matthias, are inspired by the work of celebrated 19th-century cook Alexis Soyer, and put everything theyve learnt into practice when they help three girls say thank you to two people who are very important to them

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Raj Bisram, Josie Lawrence, Mark Watson and Laura Whitmore go toe-to-toe testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of trivia-based games. Their scores are tallied across the week resulting in an overall champion

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Ricks journey draws to a close as he heads east from Oaxaca to the Yucatan Peninsula, where dishes like Papadzules and Sikil Pak are enjoyed in villages across the countryside. Here, locals feast on the hottest chilli of them all, the Habanero. Rick ends his journey feasting on grilled seafood in Tulum, along the shores of the Caribbean Sea

programme.title: James Mays Cars of the People
programme.desc: The presenter examines the social significance of cars in the 20th century. He begins by travelling to Germany, Italy and Russia to examine how dictators kick-started the mobilization of the masses, finding tales of design brilliance, abject failure, war, fraud and double dealing. James also learns about how the British motor industry blew a gift-wrapped chance to rule the world and he gets his own back with a stunt that means bad news for one of the planets most hated cars

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show in which two teams of celebs try to call each others bluff with a few stories about themselves that might be true or might be out-and-out porkies. programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Lister accidentally triggers off the ships self-destruct sequence, and there is only one way to diffuse the bomb, by lending his body to a female officer. Cult sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Kryten discovers a developing fluid has mutated, causing photographs to come to life and giving Lister a chance to change the past and avoid ever becoming lost in deep space. Sci-fi comedy, starring Chris Barrie, Craig Charles, Robert Llewellyn and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Kryten discovers his expiry date is less than 24 hours away, prompting Lister and Rimmer to organise a party he will never forget, but when the mechanoid decides to avoid being shut down he does not realise his actions could cost the rest of the crew their lives. Sci-fi comedy, starring Craig Charles and Chris Barrie

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack and Sally Bretton return for the domestic comedy, which sees the couple continuing to go from one disaster to the next, while coping with their three kids, Lucys disapproving parents, Lees feckless dad Frank and world-weary friends Toby and Anna. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy arranges a special surprise for Lees birthday, which sees their family and friends joining them in a Crystal Maze-style physical adventure game where the objective is to escape from a series of rooms. Domestic comedy, starring Lee Mack and Sally Bretton

He discovers the areas history of piracy, meets a family that make award-winning vodka, and makes a pancake with a wild blackberry compote and Cornish clotted cream

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: On the wild north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with his old friend and celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, before helping to cook up a lobster risotto. Later, at Tresillian House near Newquay, Rick meets with head gardener John Harris to find out more about his Victorian walled garden

programme.desc: The presenter examines the social significance of cars in the 20th century. He begins by travelling to Germany, Italy and Russia to examine how dictators kick-started the mobilization of the masses, finding tales of design brilliance, abject failure, war, fraud and double dealing. James also learns about how the British motor industry blew a gift-wrapped chance to rule the world and he gets his own back with a stunt that means bad news for one of the planets most hated cars

programme.desc: Sally Wainwrights crime drama picks up 18 months after the events of series one. While out solving a case of sheep rustling, Catherine discovers a decomposed body hidden in a garage on a local estate, and soon finds herself in the middle of a murder investigation. Tommy, now serving life in a high-security prison, is given some unexpected news and seeks comfort in a mysterious female visitor, while Detective Sergeant John Wadsworth faces a tough decision when his girlfriend unexpectedly turns up at the house he shares with his wife and children. Sarah Lancashire stars

Meanwhile, Brian needs to find a handyman when Esther bans him from his latest DIY project. Hugh Dennis and Samuel West guest star, with Amanda Redman

programme.desc: Feature-length episode. An old friend of Dalziel arouses suspicion by claiming a series of apparently accidental deaths may have a more sinister explanation. programme.title: New Tricks

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Documentary examining the rule of Adolf Hitler and his party, focusing on the Eastern Front during the Second World War, which many see as the defining arena of the conflict. In the autumn of 1940, Adolf Hitler has to decide what to do about the Soviet Union and its leader Joseph Stalin. He offers to carve up the post-war world in exchange for his fellow dictators support in the war against Britain, but is actually preparing an attack on the USSR

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: The adventurer sets off on a journey through the continent, beginning in the remote and little-visited north-east. In Venezuela, Simon meets some of the thousands of migrants fleeing the economic collapse of their country, while he learns that neighbouring Guyana could be on the verge of its own oil boom. He also meets a gun-toting former warlord who is now one of Surinames most successful businessmen, and ends his journey in French Guiana, where he goes to the launch site of the European Space Agency

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon starts his travels through Brazil in one of the remotest regions of the Amazon with the Waiapi people, who cling on to their traditional way of life, which is under threat from logging and mining interests. In Manaus, the city at the heart of the Amazon, he visits a neglected indigenous neighbourhood and meets a nurse who was the only source of healthcare during the pandemic. Simon ends this leg of his journey on the west coast in the city of Rio de Janeiro, where the government has built a hi-tech control room to monitor all parts of the city for potential disasters such as floods

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: In the third part of his journey, Simon travels through the Andes mountains from Peru to Bolivia, beginning at the world-famous ruins of Machu Pichu. He then visits a remote valley where the mostly indigenous population farms coca leaves. the primary ingredient of cocaine. Heading across the border into Bolivia, Simon discovers how the indigenous women known as cholas have battled for increasing influence and representation

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: On the fourth leg of his journey through the continent, Simon travels through three of the worlds most extreme environments as he takes in the salt flats of Bolivia, Brazils Pantanal wetland region and Paraguays Chaco Forest. In Bolivia, he meets a family making a living carving salt from the vast white expanse of the Uyuni flats, while in Brazil he has a close encounter with South Americas apex predator, the jaguar. In Paraguay, Simon visits a Mennonites school, where traditionally clothed children are drilled in Bible texts and there are no smartphones to be seen

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this series exploring extreme behaviour in the natural world, uncovering some of the strategies animals have developed to stay alive and to breed, from Komodo dragons tackling buffalo to the courtship battle of the humpback whale. He begins by focusing on the methods used by creatures such as cheetahs, bottle-nosed dolphins and Venus fly-traps in their fights for survival

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry spends the holiday money on a kit for Citizen Band Radio, causing friction in the household

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The couple decide to replace their childrens sandpit with a fish pond, but encounter problems when they rely on Mr Morris advice. Bernard Bresslaw guest stars

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The couple are persuaded to assist with entertaining the elderly at the Church Hall, but high drama ensues when the vicar reveals the bingo game has been rigged

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: The couple buy a video recorder, but disaster strikes when Terry offers to record a programme for the company chairman

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry becomes interested in making wine, but several disasters later, June convinces him to go to Boulogne to buy some

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: An interest in woodwork finds Terry at odds with his neighbours, especially Tarquin, the new chairman of the local Noise Abatement Society

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Documentary examining the rule of Adolf Hitler and his party, focusing on the Eastern Front during the Second World War, which many see as the defining arena of the conflict. In the autumn of 1940, Adolf Hitler has to decide what to do about the Soviet Union and its leader Joseph Stalin. He offers to carve up the post-war world in exchange for his fellow dictators support in the war against Britain, but is actually preparing an attack on the USSR

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: The adventurer sets off on a journey through the continent, beginning in the remote and little-visited north-east. In Venezuela, Simon meets some of the thousands of migrants fleeing the economic collapse of their country, while he learns that neighbouring Guyana could be on the verge of its own oil boom. He also meets a gun-toting former warlord who is now one of Surinames most successful businessmen, and ends his journey in French Guiana, where he goes to the launch site of the European Space Agency

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: Simon starts his travels through Brazil in one of the remotest regions of the Amazon with the Waiapi people, who cling on to their traditional way of life, which is under threat from logging and mining interests. In Manaus, the city at the heart of the Amazon, he visits a neglected indigenous neighbourhood and meets a nurse who was the only source of healthcare during the pandemic. Simon ends this leg of his journey on the west coast in the city of Rio de Janeiro, where the government has built a hi-tech control room to monitor all parts of the city for potential disasters such as floods

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: In the third part of his journey, Simon travels through the Andes mountains from Peru to Bolivia, beginning at the world-famous ruins of Machu Pichu. He then visits a remote valley where the mostly indigenous population farms coca leaves. the primary ingredient of cocaine. Heading across the border into Bolivia, Simon discovers how the indigenous women known as cholas have battled for increasing influence and representation

programme.title: Simon Reeves South America
programme.desc: On the fourth leg of his journey through the continent, Simon travels through three of the worlds most extreme environments as he takes in the salt flats of Bolivia, Brazils Pantanal wetland region and Paraguays Chaco Forest. In Paraguay, Simon visits a Mennonites school, where traditionally clothed children are drilled in Bible texts and there are no smartphones to be seen

programme.title: Life
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals how reptiles and amphibians, including the pebble toad and Jesus Christ lizard, conquer their shortcomings by using tricks and strategies to avoid predators. He also explores how chameleons can achieve a high level of accuracy with their muscle-propelled, extendible tongues, and finds out how a 9ft-long Komodo dragon can bring down a huge water buffalo

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee has to leave the flat when he gets a job as a caretaker, but finds the role tougher than expected. Meanwhile, Kate looks for new housemates and Tim sees a chance to revive his relationship with his ex-girlfriend. Starring Lee Mack, Megan Dodds, Tim Vine and Adrian Hood

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: When a noisy neighbour moves in, Lucy complains neither Tim nor Lee is man enough to get him to quieten down. The friends take it to heart and try to prove their masculinity, one by joining a gym and the other by confronting the new arrival - only to find he is a creepy psychopath with the eyes of a killer

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy sketch show. Tim Nice-But-Dim takes over an antiques shop, the lovely wobbly randy old ladies go to the launderette, Kevin reaches a landmark birthday and Ben Elton becomes a feminist version of Benny Hill. Plus, Waynetta kicks Wayne out. With Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth plans an extravagant riverside picnic and invites all and sundry from the higher echelons of society, including the vicar and his wife. Alas for her dreams of social success, the event proves a wash-out. Patricia Routledge stars

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: The opening day of the season arrives and staff gather to welcome the first guests at Maplins holiday camp. Comedy, starring Paul Shane, Sue Pollard and Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison realises that Kittys fond memories of her sister conceal a darker truth, and tries to help her come to terms with her past. The rest of the ghosts fear that getting Kitty to open up will just be traumatic for everyone - but end up sharing some unresolved issues of their own. Mike resorts to witchcraft in a bid to see the ghosts for himself

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: Stevens new girlfriend, the aristocratic Portia de Coogan, thinks its about time he met her father, Lord Fotheringham, and to make a good first impression, its vital the actor tries to improve his sense of humour. Meanwhile, some voiceover work for the Royal Navy leads to a terrifying visit to the launch of a submarine. Comedy, starring Matt Berry

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Ted has a chance of stardom when he is hired as a late replacement at an uptown show for a fellow comedian. It is rumoured that talent scouts from the TV show Opportunity Knocks will be in the audience. Classic comedy following life at Maplins holiday camp, starring Paul Shane, Su Pollard and Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher takes on the role of agony aunt and ends up writing letters home for his fellow inmates - but he soon discovers domestic problems of his own when his daughter brings bad news on visiting day. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Patricia Brake

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie reluctantly signs up for Farm Idol, a new reality TV show aimed at finding Britains sexiest rural workers, while Mrs Cakeworthy becomes suspicious of Marlene when a well-dressed man visits her while her husband is away. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Grace decides to cater for working people by opening the shop at 8.30 in the morning, much to the staffs displeasure. They wonder if this is the shape of things to come, or whether they can put paid to the plans to boost profits. Comedy, with John Inman, Mollie Sugden and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: After suffering a brush with Stella, Hobbo comes to the conclusion that it is time to find her a man - and, with the help of Clegg and Truly, he decides that eligible village heart-throb Norris Fairburn is the right match. Pearls new-found passion for motorcycling causes trouble for Howard and Marina

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Randolph Make a Good Impression?
programme.desc: Hobbos quest to find a man for Stella leads him to put up an advertisement, but the suitor who turns up lacks what it takes to tackle the widow and runs off. However, a chance to hit back emerges when Hobbo finds out who Stellas favourite movie character is

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin enters the pub snooker tournament, but is put out when he learns Paul is also a contender. Comedy, starring Richard Briers, Penelope Wilton and Peter Egan. First broadcast November 18, 1984

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher takes on the role of agony aunt and ends up writing letters home for his fellow inmates - but he soon discovers domestic problems of his own when his daughter brings bad news on visiting day. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Patricia Brake

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth disappoints Richard by buying him a pair of skis for his birthday, intending to strap them to the car in yet another attempt to impress the neighbours. However, the scheme backfires when her rich sister Violet arrives and cuts her down to size

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: The platoon defends headquarters in an exercise against members of the Highland Regiment, leaving Captain Mainwaring and his men with little choice but to spy on their rivals to try to come up with a plan to defeat them. Comedy first broadcast in 1969, starring Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Dads Army
programme.desc: Prime Minister Winston Churchill is to visit Walmington-on-Sea, and there is a shooting contest between Captain Mainwarings unit and a rival platoon from nearby Eastgate to see who will have the honour of guarding him. Classic comedy first aired in 1968, guest starring Barbara Windsor, with Arthur Lowe and John Le Mesurier

programme.title: Ever Decreasing Circles
programme.desc: Martin enters the pub snooker tournament, but is put out when he learns Paul is also a contender. Comedy, starring Richard Briers, Penelope Wilton and Peter Egan. First broadcast November 18, 1984

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Mr Grace decides to cater for working people by opening the shop at 8.30 in the morning, much to the staffs displeasure. They wonder if this is the shape of things to come, or whether they can put paid to the plans to boost profits. Comedy, with John Inman, Mollie Sugden and Trevor Bannister

programme.title: Porridge

programme.title: Dads Army

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Stella Find True Love with Norris Fairburn?
programme.desc: After suffering a brush with Stella, Hobbo comes to the conclusion that it is time to find her a man - and, with the help of Clegg and Truly, he decides that eligible village heart-throb Norris Fairburn is the right match. Pearls new-found passion for motorcycling causes trouble for Howard and Marina

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: Will Randolph Make a Good Impression?
programme.desc: Hobbos quest to find a man for Stella leads him to put up an advertisement, but the suitor who turns up lacks what it takes to tackle the widow and runs off. However, a chance to hit back emerges when Hobbo finds out who Stellas favourite movie character is

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee has to leave the flat when he gets a job as a caretaker, but finds the role tougher than expected. Meanwhile, Kate looks for new housemates and Tim sees a chance to revive his relationship with his ex-girlfriend. Starring Lee Mack, Megan Dodds, Tim Vine and Adrian Hood

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: As Lucy and Guys relationship intensifies, Lee begins to feel isolated and is encouraged to try speed-dating. Tim takes Barbara on a night out with surprising consequences. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine and Sally Bretton

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Tony returns from holiday sporting an ill-advised beard, which he mistakenly thinks is bound to impress Deborah. Gary, meanwhile, has a problem of a different kind - Dorothy has moved in and he is not so sure it is a good idea after all, especially once she starts filling the flat with girly things. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Cathy goes to extreme lengths to impress her psychologist boyfriend, much to Agness disgust, while Rory locates the perfect apartment for him and Dino - the problem is, its in Kilbride, meaning hell have to learn to drive. Mark prepares to emigrate to Australia. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarkes comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: As Lucy and Guys relationship intensifies, Lee begins to feel isolated and is encouraged to try speed-dating. Tim takes Barbara on a night out with surprising consequences. Comedy, starring Lee Mack, Tim Vine and Sally Bretton

Mark prepares to emigrate to Australia. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Ted has a chance of stardom when he is hired as a late replacement at an uptown show for a fellow comedian. It is rumoured that talent scouts from the TV show Opportunity Knocks will be in the audience. Classic comedy following life at Maplins holiday camp, starring Paul Shane, Su Pollard and Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: After a recent break-up, Alma tries to get her life back on track, but with no job, no qualifications and a rebellious streak a mile wide, it is not going to be easy. Meanwhile, her heroin-addicted mother has been sectioned for arson, and her grandmother Joan wants nothing to do with it. Comedy pilot, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison spends more time with Lucy and starts planning to make a big investment - but the Captain and Kitty uncover something suspicious, and need Fannys newfound sleuthing skills to get to the bottom of the mystery before it is too late. Thomas works on his football skills with a little help form Humphreys head, and Julian lends an unseen helping hand to Mikes promo film

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: Steven needs to raise money to pay for an acrimonious divorce and there are two potential solutions - a starring role in a new film being made by an Arab billionaire, or a laxative advert. He plumps for the former - against the advice of his agent - but given the content of the movie, has the actor made the right decision? Comedy, starring Matt Berry

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie reluctantly signs up for Farm Idol, a new reality TV show aimed at finding Britains sexiest rural workers, while Mrs Cakeworthy becomes suspicious of Marlene when a well-dressed man visits her while her husband is away. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: The Long Legs of the Law
programme.desc: Rodney starts going out with a policewoman, much to the consternation of dodgy dealer Del-Boy, who is terrified that one wrong word from his little brother could see him banged up for five years. Vintage comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, David Jason and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del gets the chance to sell off a couple of antique urns - the only problem being that one of them contains the ashes of Triggers late grandfather. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst, Lennard Pearce and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del takes up cards in his latest bid to make his first million - much to the annoyance of Rodney and Grandad, who reckon he will end up gambling away all their worldly goods. Comedy with the wheeler-dealing Trotter family, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy cannot believe his ears when Rodney tells him he has found a girlfriend. The trouble is, the woman is old enough to be his mother - and to make matters worse, her husband is about to be released from prison

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del jumps at the opportunity to decorate the local Chinese restaurant to make a quick profit, and the results are outstanding in more ways than one. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney reluctantly agree to let Grandad accompany them on their holiday abroad - a decision they come to regret. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters embark on a venture involving the decoration of Denzils flat. When they find his wifes beloved canary lying dead in its cage, they assume responsibility and race to replace it before the deal is ruined. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del pays a stripper to attend a party at the Nags Head with Rodney, who has been bet by Mickey Pearce that he cannot find a date for the occasion. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: Fig Biscuits and Inspirational Toilet Rolls
programme.desc: Arkwright decides to open the shop before dawn to catch the morning rush and tries a special promotion to get rid of some of the goods, including fig biscuits and toilet rolls

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Now the main man on BBC magazine show This Time, Alan is relishing his career Indian summer. However, conscious of being left in the shadow of co-presenter Jennie and alert to potential changes behind the scenes, he grows ever more anxious about his place in the big time. Return of the media-based comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: The broadcaster takes to the skies with a flight in a spitfire, while This Time co-presenter Jennie comes face to face with her online troll. Plus, new band Cayman perform live on their show. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

Mark prepares to emigrate to Australia. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville buys too much stock and needs to come up with a way of getting rid of it all. Luckily, the visiting salesman gives him a cunning marketing idea. Meanwhile, Eric is not getting on with his wife, so he seeks emergency romantic advice from Leroy. Can the young Romeo help his hapless friend woo his missus again?

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville struggles to find some privacy when the milkwoman makes a pass at him, so nurse Gladys Emmanuel steps in by persuading Arkwright to take her to a hotel. Comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason Granville First broadcast in March 1981

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: A special regal edition sees a member of the royal family welcomed to the studio. But can Alan maintain his dignity in the face of a career-defining setback? Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Almas dream of becoming an actress isnt going to be easy and she needs to find a day job. After unsuccessfully dipping her toe into the world of escorting, she reluctantly takes up a position at a sandwich shop. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy sketch show. Tim Nice-But-Dim takes over an antiques shop, the lovely wobbly randy old ladies go to the launderette, Kevin reaches a landmark birthday and Ben Elton becomes a feminist version of Benny Hill. Plus, Waynetta kicks Wayne out. With Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth plans an extravagant riverside picnic and invites all and sundry from the higher echelons of society, including the vicar and his wife. Alas for her dreams of social success, the event proves a wash-out. Patricia Routledge stars

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: The opening day of the season arrives and staff gather to welcome the first guests at Maplins holiday camp. Comedy, starring Paul Shane, Sue Pollard and Ruth Madoc

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison realises that Kittys fond memories of her sister conceal a darker truth, and tries to help her come to terms with her past. The rest of the ghosts fear that getting Kitty to open up will just be traumatic for everyone - but end up sharing some unresolved issues of their own. Mike resorts to witchcraft in a bid to see the ghosts for himself

programme.title: Toast of London
programme.desc: Stevens new girlfriend, the aristocratic Portia de Coogan, thinks its about time he met her father, Lord Fotheringham, and to make a good first impression, its vital the actor tries to improve his sense of humour. Meanwhile, some voiceover work for the Royal Navy leads to a terrifying visit to the launch of a submarine. Comedy, starring Matt Berry

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: Boycie reluctantly signs up for Farm Idol, a new reality TV show aimed at finding Britains sexiest rural workers, while Mrs Cakeworthy becomes suspicious of Marlene when a well-dressed man visits her while her husband is away. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: The Long Legs of the Law
programme.desc: Rodney starts going out with a policewoman, much to the consternation of dodgy dealer Del-Boy, who is terrified that one wrong word from his little brother could see him banged up for five years. Vintage comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, David Jason and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del gets the chance to sell off a couple of antique urns - the only problem being that one of them contains the ashes of Triggers late grandfather. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst, Lennard Pearce and Roger Lloyd Pack

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del takes up cards in his latest bid to make his first million - much to the annoyance of Rodney and Grandad, who reckon he will end up gambling away all their worldly goods. Comedy with the wheeler-dealing Trotter family, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy cannot believe his ears when Rodney tells him he has found a girlfriend. The trouble is, the woman is old enough to be his mother - and to make matters worse, her husband is about to be released from prison

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del jumps at the opportunity to decorate the local Chinese restaurant to make a quick profit, and the results are outstanding in more ways than one. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del and Rodney reluctantly agree to let Grandad accompany them on their holiday abroad - a decision they come to regret. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: After lending assistance to a wealthy woman in distress, Del seizes a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to improve his social standing by launching his own chandelier-cleaning business. As part of the venture, he ropes a reluctant Rodney and Grandad into helping him. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters embark on a venture involving the decoration of Denzils flat. When they find his wifes beloved canary lying dead in its cage, they assume responsibility and race to replace it before the deal is ruined. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.desc: Del pays a stripper to attend a party at the Nags Head with Rodney, who has been bet by Mickey Pearce that he cannot find a date for the occasion. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarkes comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: Fig Biscuits and Inspirational Toilet Rolls
programme.desc: Arkwright decides to open the shop before dawn to catch the morning rush and tries a special promotion to get rid of some of the goods, including fig biscuits and toilet rolls

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Now the main man on BBC magazine show This Time, Alan is relishing his career Indian summer. However, conscious of being left in the shadow of co-presenter Jennie and alert to potential changes behind the scenes, he grows ever more anxious about his place in the big time. Return of the media-based comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: The broadcaster takes to the skies with a flight in a spitfire, while This Time co-presenter Jennie comes face to face with her online troll. Plus, new band Cayman perform live on their show. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Cathy goes to extreme lengths to impress her psychologist boyfriend, much to Agness disgust, while Rory locates the perfect apartment for him and Dino - the problem is, its in Kilbride, meaning hell have to learn to drive. Mark prepares to emigrate to Australia. Hit comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll as the foul-mouthed mother-of-six

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Roy Clarkes comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and David Jason. Tight-fisted shopkeeper Arkwright purchases fire-damaged stock, only to find all the tins have lost their labels

programme.title: The Good Life
programme.desc: Tom sets out to catch the thief responsible for stealing leeks from his garden, but ends up landing himself in trouble. Self-sufficiency comedy, starring Richard Briers, Felicity Kendal and Penelope Keith

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy cannot believe his ears when Rodney tells him he has found a girlfriend. The trouble is, the woman is old enough to be his mother - and to make matters worse, her husband is about to be released from prison

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: A special regal edition sees a member of the royal family welcomed to the studio. But can Alan maintain his dignity in the face of a career-defining setback? Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, Susannah Fielding, Felicity Montagu and Tim Key

programme.title: Almas Not Normal
programme.desc: Almas dream of becoming an actress isnt going to be easy and she needs to find a day job. After unsuccessfully dipping her toe into the world of escorting, she reluctantly takes up a position at a sandwich shop. Comedy, written by and starring Sophie Willan

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The newlyweds return from their honeymoon to a big welcome from both their families. However, Smithy seems disconcerted by his pals return and Nessa makes a confession that spoils the happy occasion. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne, James Corden and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Smithy goes missing following Nessas shocking revelation, and the boys try to track him down to persuade him to accept his responsibilities. Meanwhile, Stacey is forced to contemplate the consequences of transforming her long-distance relationship with Gavin into a functioning marriage

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its the Reading Festival and the junior doctors have no idea what?s in store for them, from a possible drug overdose to a mosh pit injury

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Bigger Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy presents the conclusion of the special focusing on rehousing Ukrainian refugees in six vacant terraced houses at Kingston College in Mitchelstown, North Cork. Baz is joined by Aoife Rhattigan and Kerry Hiddleston, who oversee the design, while Brandon Duarte from MMD Construction is in charge of the build, and Diarmuid Gavin plans the garden design

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis meets the Oscar-winning actress at her home in Surrey for a candid and lively conversation about her long career, her passion for theatre, her life away from acting and her relationship with her husband, the late Michael Williams. Louis also accompanies Judi to the Gielgud Theatre in Londons West End, where they discuss the difficulties of the lockdown and how it inadvertently led to her surprise popularity on TikTok

programme.desc: West Midlands paramedics assess a man police have found acting erratically on a busy dual carriageway and believe has taken the powerful psychoactive Monkey Dust

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps rehabilitate a group of ex-racing greyhounds who have never experienced life beyond the racetrack

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles hits the road to catch up with some of the inspirational people and communities the show has helped in its 20-year history. On his travels across the length and breadth of the country, Nick returns to some of the series biggest and most challenging builds, including Canada Street in Manchester, The Yard in Edinburgh, and DIY SOSs most logistically-difficult and longest build - the construction of the Grenfell Community Centre and Dale Youth Boxing club

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Comedian Rhod Gilbert dons his hard hat as guest presenter for this ambitious build in Brandesburton near Hull, East Yorkshire. The team are joined by local volunteers to transform an overgrown 2.5 acres into a purpose-built adventure campsite for the St Michaels Youth Project (St Mikes), which receives funding from Children in Need

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets Scunthorpe woman Caroline Blanchard, a single mum who has twice had to make the decision to turn off the life support for people she loves. She and her children live in the shadow of the garage, where seven-year-old Natasha banged her head in 2007, and the conservatory, where husband and father Paul had a heart attack four years later. The volunteers plan is to give them a new home for a new start, including demolishing the conservatory and garage where these two tragedies occurred
